DATABASE.md:# Configuração do Banco de Dados (Supabase)
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:Para que o aplicativo Nexus Invest Engine funcione corretamente na nuvem, você precisa criar a tabela de transações no seu projeto Supabase.
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:## 1. Criar Tabela `transactions`
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:Execute o seguinte SQL no Editor SQL do seu painel Supabase:
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:```sql
DATABASE.md:-- 1. Criar Tabela `users` (Perfil Público)
DATABASE.md:CREATE TABLE users (
DATABASE.md:  id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) PRIMARY KEY,
DATABASE.md:  full_name TEXT,
DATABASE.md:  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT TIMEZONE('utc'::text, NOW()) NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT TIMEZONE('utc'::text, NOW()) NOT NULL
DATABASE.md:);
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:-- Habilitar RLS para users
DATABASE.md:ALTER TABLE users ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own profile" ON users FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own profile" ON users FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own profile" ON users FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = id);
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:-- 2. Criar Tabela `transactions`
DATABASE.md:CREATE TABLE transactions (
DATABASE.md:  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
DATABASE.md:  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT TIMEZONE('utc'::text, NOW()) NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  ticker TEXT NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  type TEXT CHECK (type IN ('BUY', 'SELL')) NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  asset_type TEXT NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  quantity DECIMAL NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  price DECIMAL NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  broker TEXT
DATABASE.md:);
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:-- Habilitar Row Level Security (RLS)
DATABASE.md:ALTER TABLE transactions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own transactions" ON transactions FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own transactions" ON transactions FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own transactions" ON transactions FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can delete their own transactions" ON transactions FOR DELETE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_user_id ON transactions(user_id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_ticker ON transactions(ticker);
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:-- 3. Tabela de eventos corporativos (Desdobramentos/Grupamentos)
DATABASE.md:CREATE TABLE corporate_events (
DATABASE.md:  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
DATABASE.md:  ticker TEXT NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  type TEXT CHECK (type IN ('SPLIT', 'INPLIT', 'DIVIDEND')) NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  factor DECIMAL,
DATABASE.md:  value DECIMAL,
DATABASE.md:  date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT TIMEZONE('utc'::text, NOW()) NOT NULL
DATABASE.md:);
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:ALTER TABLE corporate_events ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Public read corporate events" ON corporate_events FOR SELECT USING (true);
DATABASE.md:```
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:## 2. Configurar Variáveis de Ambiente
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:No AI Studio, vá em **Settings** e adicione as seguintes variáveis:
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:- `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`: A URL do seu projeto Supabase.
DATABASE.md:- `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`: A chave anônima (anon key) do seu projeto Supabase.
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:## 3. Autenticação
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:O aplicativo utiliza o Google Login por padrão. Certifique-se de que o provedor Google está habilitado no seu painel Supabase em **Authentication > Providers**.
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:## 4. Criar Tabela `dividends` (Proventos)
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:Execute o seguinte SQL no Editor SQL do seu painel Supabase para criar a nova tabela de Proventos:
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:```sql
DATABASE.md:-- Criar tabela de proventos (dividendos)
DATABASE.md:CREATE TABLE dividends (
DATABASE.md:  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
DATABASE.md:  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT TIMEZONE('utc'::text, NOW()) NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  ticker TEXT NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  type TEXT DEFAULT 'ACAO' NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  amount DECIMAL NOT NULL,
DATABASE.md:  is_future BOOLEAN DEFAULT false
DATABASE.md:);
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:-- Habilitar Row Level Security (RLS)
DATABASE.md:ALTER TABLE dividends ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:-- Políticas
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own dividends" ON dividends FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own dividends" ON dividends FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own dividends" ON dividends FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
DATABASE.md:CREATE POLICY "Users can delete their own dividends" ON dividends FOR DELETE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
DATABASE.md:
DATABASE.md:-- Índices
DATABASE.md:CREATE INDEX idx_dividends_user_id ON dividends(user_id);
DATABASE.md:```

api/app.ts:        try {

api/app.ts:          res.status(200).set({ "Content-Type": "text/html" }).end(template);

api/app.ts:          vite.ssrFixStacktrace(e as Error);
api/app.ts:          next(e);
api/app.ts:        }
api/app.ts:      });
api/app.ts:    } else {
api/app.ts:      const distPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist');
api/app.ts:      if (fs.existsSync(distPath)) {
api/app.ts:        app.use(express.static(distPath));
api/app.ts:        app.get('*', (_req, res) => {
api/app.ts:          const indexPath = path.join(distPath, 'index.html');
api/app.ts:          if (fs.existsSync(indexPath)) {
api/app.ts:            res.sendFile(indexPath);
api/app.ts:          } else {
api/app.ts:            res.status(404).send('Not Found');
api/app.ts:          }
api/app.ts:        });
api/app.ts:      }
api/app.ts:    }
api/app.ts:
api/app.ts:    // Global Error Handler
api/app.ts:    app.use((err: any, req: express.Request, res: express.Response, _next: express.NextFunction) => {
api/app.ts:      console.error(`[SERVER ERROR] [${new Date().toISOString()}]`, err);
api/app.ts:      
api/app.ts:      let errorMessage = err.message;
api/app.ts:      let errorDetails = err;
api/app.ts:
api/app.ts:      // Try to parse JSON error messages or handle objects with 'errors' property
api/app.ts:      try {
api/app.ts:        if (err.errors && Array.isArray(err.errors)) {
api/app.ts:          errorMessage = err.errors.map((e: any) => e.message || e.description || JSON.stringify(e)).join(', ');
api/app.ts:        } else if (typeof errorMessage === 'string' && (errorMessage.startsWith('{') || errorMessage.startsWith('['))) {
api/app.ts:          const parsed = JSON.parse(errorMessage);
api/app.ts:          if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
api/app.ts:            errorMessage = parsed.map((e: any) => e.message || e.description || JSON.stringify(e)).join(', ');
api/app.ts:          } else if (parsed.errors && Array.isArray(parsed.errors)) {
api/app.ts:            errorMessage = parsed.errors.map((e: any) => e.message || e.description || JSON.stringify(e)).join(', ');
api/app.ts:          } else if (parsed.message) {
api/app.ts:            errorMessage = parsed.message;
api/app.ts:          }
api/app.ts:        }
api/app.ts:      } catch (e) {

src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const p = parseFloat(amount.replace(/[^\d.]/g, '')) || 0;
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const pmt = parseFloat(monthly.replace(/[^\d.]/g, '')) || 0;
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const n = parseInt(period) || 12;
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const cdiAnual = 0.1065; // 10.65%
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const selicAnual = 0.1075; // 10.75%
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const ipcaAnual = 0.0450; // 4.5%
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const poupancaAnual = 0.0617; // 6.17%
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const calculateFV = (initial: number, monthly: number, rateAnual: number, months: number) => {
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      const r = Math.pow(1 + rateAnual, 1/12) - 1;
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      const fvInitial = initial * Math.pow(1 + r, months);
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      const fvMonthly = r === 0 ? monthly * months : monthly * ((Math.pow(1 + r, months) - 1) / r);
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      return fvInitial + fvMonthly;
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    };
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    const res = {
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      poupanca: calculateFV(p, pmt, poupancaAnual, n),
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      cdi100: calculateFV(p, pmt, cdiAnual, n),
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      cdi120: calculateFV(p, pmt, cdiAnual * 1.2, n),
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      tesouroIPCA: calculateFV(p, pmt, ipcaAnual + 0.06, n),
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:      totalInvested: p + (pmt * n)
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    };
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    
src/pages/FixedIncome.tsx:    setSimulationResult(res);

src/pages/Compare.tsx:  const compareValues = (val1: any, val2: any, key: string) => {
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    if (val1 === undefined || val2 === undefined) return null;
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    const parse = (v: any) => {
src/pages/Compare.tsx:      if (typeof v === 'number') return v;
src/pages/Compare.tsx:      if (typeof v === 'string') {
src/pages/Compare.tsx:        return parseFloat(v.replace('%', '').replace(',', '.'));
src/pages/Compare.tsx:      }
src/pages/Compare.tsx:      return 0;
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    };
src/pages/Compare.tsx:
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    const n1 = parse(val1);
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    const n2 = parse(val2);
src/pages/Compare.tsx:
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    // For some indicators, lower is better (P/L, P/VP)
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    const lowerIsBetter = ['pl', 'pvp'].includes(key);
src/pages/Compare.tsx:
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    if (n1 === n2) return null;
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    if (lowerIsBetter) {
src/pages/Compare.tsx:      return n1 < n2 ? 'asset1' : 'asset2';
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    }
src/pages/Compare.tsx:    return n1 > n2 ? 'asset1' : 'asset2';
src/pages/Compare.tsx:  };

src/pages/Screener.tsx:import { useState } from 'react';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:import { Filter, Search, Loader2, ArrowUpDown, ChevronRight, SlidersHorizontal } from 'lucide-react';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:import { financeService } from '../services/financeService';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:import { AssetIcon } from '../components/ui/AssetIcon';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:import { PageHeader } from '../components/ui/PageHeader';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:
src/pages/Screener.tsx:export default function Screener() {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const [type, setType] = useState('ACAO');
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const [filters, setFilters] = useState({
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    minDY: '',
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    maxPL: '',
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    maxPVP: '',
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    minROE: '',
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    minMargemLiquida: '',
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    minVPA: '',
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  });
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const [results, setResults] = useState<any[]>([]);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const [hasSearched, setHasSearched] = useState(false);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState<{ key: string, direction: 'asc' | 'desc' }>({ key: 'dy', direction: 'desc' });
src/pages/Screener.tsx:
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const handleSearch = async () => {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    setHasSearched(true);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    try {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      const data = await financeService.getScreener(filters, type);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      setResults(data);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      console.error('Screener failed:', error);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      setResults([]);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    } finally {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    }
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  };
src/pages/Screener.tsx:
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const handleSort = (key: string) => {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    let direction: 'asc' | 'desc' = 'desc';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    if (sortConfig.key === key && sortConfig.direction === 'desc') {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      direction = 'asc';
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    }
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    setSortConfig({ key, direction });
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  };
src/pages/Screener.tsx:
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  const sortedResults = [...results].sort((a, b) => {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    const parse = (v: any) => {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      if (typeof v === 'number') return v;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      if (typeof v === 'string') return parseFloat(v.replace('%', '').replace(',', '.')) || 0;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      return 0;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    };
src/pages/Screener.tsx:
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    let aVal, bVal;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    switch (sortConfig.key) {
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      case 'ticker': aVal = a.ticker; bVal = b.ticker; break;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      case 'price': aVal = parse(a.results.precoAtual); bVal = parse(b.results.precoAtual); break;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      case 'dy': aVal = parse(a.results.dividendYield); bVal = parse(b.results.dividendYield); break;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      case 'pl': aVal = parse(a.results.pl); bVal = parse(b.results.pl); break;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      case 'pvp': aVal = parse(a.results.pvp); bVal = parse(b.results.pvp); break;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:      default: return 0;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    }
src/pages/Screener.tsx:
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    if (aVal < bVal) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    if (aVal > bVal) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:    return 0;
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  });
src/pages/Screener.tsx:
src/pages/Screener.tsx:  return (

src/pages/AssetAnalysis.tsx:const formatMetricValue = (key: string, value: any) => {

src/pages/AssetAnalysis.tsx:  if (['marketCap', 'valorMercado', 'patrimonioLiquido', 'enterpriseValue', 'liquidezMediaDiaria', 'receitaLiquida', 'ebitda', 'lucroLiquido'].includes(key)) {

src/pages/AssetAnalysis.tsx:      return `R$ ${num.toLocaleString('pt-BR')}`;
src/pages/AssetAnalysis.tsx:    }
src/pages/AssetAnalysis.tsx:  }
src/pages/AssetAnalysis.tsx:
src/pages/AssetAnalysis.tsx:  if (['precoAtual', 'vpa', 'lpa', 'ultimoRendimento', 'valorPatrimonialCota', 'vpa_val', 'lpa_val'].includes(key)) {

src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:import { usePortfolio } from '../hooks/usePortfolio';
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:import { PageHeader } from '../components/ui/PageHeader';
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:import { Scale, ArrowRight, AlertCircle, DollarSign, Target, TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react';
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:import { motion } from 'motion/react';
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:export default function Rebalance() {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const { portfolio, loading } = usePortfolio();
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const [investmentAmount, setInvestmentAmount] = useState<string>('1000');
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const [targets, setTargets] = useState<Record<string, number>>({});
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  // Initialize targets evenly if not set
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    if (portfolio.length > 0 && Object.keys(targets).length === 0) {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      const evenSplit = 100 / portfolio.length;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      const initialTargets: Record<string, number> = {};
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      portfolio.forEach(item => {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:        initialTargets[item.ticker] = evenSplit;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      });
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      setTargets(initialTargets);
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    }
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  }, [portfolio, targets]);
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const handleTargetChange = (ticker: string, value: string) => {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    const numValue = parseFloat(value) || 0;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    setTargets(prev => ({ ...prev, [ticker]: numValue }));
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  };
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const totalTarget = Object.values(targets).reduce((acc, val) => acc + val, 0);
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const isTargetValid = Math.abs(totalTarget - 100) < 0.1;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const totalCurrentValue = portfolio.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.currentValue || item.totalInvested), 0);
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const totalFutureValue = totalCurrentValue + (parseFloat(investmentAmount) || 0);
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  const rebalanceData = portfolio.map(item => {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    const currentValue = item.currentValue || item.totalInvested;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    const currentPercentage = totalCurrentValue > 0 ? (currentValue / totalCurrentValue) * 100 : 0;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    const targetPercentage = targets[item.ticker] || 0;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    const targetValue = totalFutureValue * (targetPercentage / 100);
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    const deltaValue = targetValue - currentValue;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    const currentPrice = item.currentPrice || item.averagePrice;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    const suggestedShares = currentPrice > 0 ? deltaValue / currentPrice : 0;
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    return {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      ...item,
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      currentPercentage,
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      targetPercentage,
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      targetValue,
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      deltaValue,
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      suggestedShares
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    };
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  }).sort((a, b) => b.deltaValue - a.deltaValue);
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  if (loading) {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    return (
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-32 gap-4">
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:        <Loader2 className="animate-spin text-blue-500 icon-xl" />
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:        <p className="text-label text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest animate-pulse">Sincronizando...</p>
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      </div>
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    );
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  }
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  if (portfolio.length === 0) {
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:    return (
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:      <div className="space-y-8">
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:        <PageHeader 
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:          title="Rebalanceamento"

src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:        />
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:        <div className="bg-white/5 border border-white/5 rounded-3xl p-12 text-center space-y-4">

src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:  return (

src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:

src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:                      max="100"

src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:                      value={targets[item.ticker] || 0}
src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:                      onChange={(e) => handleTargetChange(item.ticker, e.target.value)}

src/pages/Rebalance.tsx:                      <input

src/pages/Dividends.tsx:        quantityAtDate: Math.max(0, qtyAtDate), // Ensure no negative quantities
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:        totalAmount: amount * Math.max(0, qtyAtDate)
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:      };
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:    }).filter(div => div.quantityAtDate > 0); // Only keep dividends where user had an active position
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:  }, [dividends, portfolio]);

src/pages/Dividends.tsx:  const monthlyHistory = useMemo(() => {

src/pages/Dividends.tsx:    const now = new Date();
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:    
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:    // Last 12 months (including current month) + next 2 months for future viewing

src/pages/Dividends.tsx:    }
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:    processedDividends.forEach(div => {
src/pages/Dividends.tsx:      const d = new Date(div.paymentDate || div.date);

src/pages/Dividends.tsx:    const totalReceived = pastDividends.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.totalAmount, 0);

src/pages/Menu.tsx:  const [isInstallable, setIsInstallable] = useState(false);

src/pages/Menu.tsx:      e.preventDefault();
src/pages/Menu.tsx:      setDeferredPrompt(e);
src/pages/Menu.tsx:      setIsInstallable(true);
src/pages/Menu.tsx:    };
src/pages/Menu.tsx:
src/pages/Menu.tsx:    window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handler);
src/pages/Menu.tsx:
src/pages/Menu.tsx:    return () => {
src/pages/Menu.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handler);
src/pages/Menu.tsx:    };

src/pages/Menu.tsx:    const { outcome } = await deferredPrompt.userChoice;

src/pages/Menu.tsx:      setIsInstallable(false);
src/pages/Menu.tsx:    }
src/pages/Menu.tsx:    setDeferredPrompt(null);

src/pages/Portfolio.tsx:    });

src/pages/Calculators.tsx:import { PageHeader } from '../components/ui/PageHeader';
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:import { Calculator, DollarSign, TrendingUp, ArrowRight, Target, Percent, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:import { useState } from 'react';
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react';
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:type CalcType = 'COMPOUND' | 'BAZIN' | 'GRAHAM' | 'FIRE';
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:export default function Calculators() {
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [activeCalc, setActiveCalc] = useState<CalcType>('COMPOUND');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  // Compound Interest State
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [initialAmount, setInitialAmount] = useState('10000');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [monthlyContribution, setMonthlyContribution] = useState('1000');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [interestRate, setInterestRate] = useState('10');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [years, setYears] = useState('10');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  // Bazin State
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [avgDividend, setAvgDividend] = useState('2.50');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [desiredYield, setDesiredYield] = useState('6');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  // Graham State
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [vpa, setVpa] = useState('20.50');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [lpa, setLpa] = useState('3.20');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  // FIRE State
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [monthlyExpenses, setMonthlyExpenses] = useState('5000');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const [withdrawalRate, setWithdrawalRate] = useState('4');
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const calculateCompoundInterest = () => {
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const p = parseFloat(initialAmount) || 0;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const pmt = parseFloat(monthlyContribution) || 0;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const r = (parseFloat(interestRate) || 0) / 100 / 12;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const n = (parseFloat(years) || 0) * 12;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const futureValueP = p * Math.pow(1 + r, n);
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const futureValuePMT = r === 0 ? pmt * n : pmt * ((Math.pow(1 + r, n) - 1) / r);
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const total = futureValueP + futureValuePMT;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const totalInvested = p + (pmt * n);
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const totalInterest = total - totalInvested;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    return { total, totalInvested, totalInterest };
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  };
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const calculateBazin = () => {
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const div = parseFloat(avgDividend) || 0;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const yield_target = (parseFloat(desiredYield) || 6) / 100;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const ceilingPrice = yield_target === 0 ? 0 : div / yield_target;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    return { ceilingPrice };
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  };
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const calculateGraham = () => {
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const v = parseFloat(vpa) || 0;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const l = parseFloat(lpa) || 0;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    // Graham Formula: Preço Justo = sqrt(22.5 * LPA * VPA)
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const fairPrice = Math.sqrt(22.5 * l * v);
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    return { fairPrice };
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  };
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const calculateFIRE = () => {
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const expenses = parseFloat(monthlyExpenses) || 0;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const rate = (parseFloat(withdrawalRate) || 4) / 100;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    const targetNetWorth = rate === 0 ? 0 : (expenses * 12) / rate;
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    return { targetNetWorth };
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  };
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const compoundResults = calculateCompoundInterest();
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const bazinResults = calculateBazin();
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const grahamResults = calculateGraham();
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  const fireResults = calculateFIRE();
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:  return (
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:    <div className="space-y-3 pb-12">
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:      <PageHeader 
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:        title="Calculadoras"
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:        description="Simule seus investimentos e planeje seu futuro."
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:        icon={Calculator}
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:      />
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:      <div className="flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-2">
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:        {[
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:          { id: 'COMPOUND', label: 'Juros Compostos', icon: TrendingUp },
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:          { id: 'BAZIN', label: 'Preço Teto (Bazin)', icon: Percent },
src/pages/Calculators.tsx:          { id: 'GRAHAM', label: 'Preço Justo (Graham)', icon: Shield },

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:  const handleImport = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:    if (!file) return;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:    reader.onload = async (evt) => {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:      try {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        const bstr = evt.target?.result;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        const wb = XLSX.read(bstr, { type: 'binary' });

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        const isConfigured = import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL && import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        const newTxs: any[] = [];
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        // Helper para inferir tipo de ativo (AÇÃO vs FII) de forma mais inteligente
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        const inferType = (ticker: string, row: any) => {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const t = ticker.toUpperCase().trim();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const mercado = String(row.Mercado || row['Tipo de Ativo'] || row['Tipo Ativo'] || row['Categoria'] || '').toUpperCase();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const produto = String(row.Produto || row['Nome do Ativo'] || row['Ativo'] || '').toUpperCase();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          // 1. Palavras-chave explícitas (Alta prioridade)
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (mercado.includes('FII') || mercado.includes('IMOBILIÁRIO') || produto.includes('FII ') || produto.includes('FUNDO DE INVESTIMENTO IMOBILIARIO')) return 'FII';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (mercado.includes('BDR') || produto.includes('BDR ')) return 'BDR';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (mercado.includes('ETF') || mercado.includes('ÍNDICE') || produto.includes('ETF ') || produto.includes('FUNDO DE INDICE')) return 'ETF';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (mercado.includes('CRIPTO') || mercado.includes('BITCOIN') || produto.includes('BITCOIN') || produto.includes('ETHEREUM')) return 'CRIPT';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          // 2. Lógica de sufixo de Ticker (Média prioridade)
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (t.endsWith('11')) {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            // Lista expandida de ETFs conhecidos
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            const etfs = [
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              'BOVA11', 'IVVB11', 'SMAL11', 'DIVO11', 'HASH11', 'WRLD11', 'XINA11', 'NASD11', 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              'BOVV11', 'BRAX11', 'ECOO11', 'FIND11', 'GOVE11', 'MATB11', 'ISUS11', 'PIBB11', 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              'SPXI11', 'USTK11', 'ACWI11', 'GOLD11', 'QBTC11', 'QETH11', 'BITH11', 'ETHE11'
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            ];
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (etfs.includes(t)) return 'ETF';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            // Se for 4 letras + 11 e não for ETF conhecido, é quase certamente FII
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (/^[A-Z]{4}11$/.test(t)) return 'FII';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            return 'ETF'; // Fallback para outros finais 11
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (t.endsWith('31') || t.endsWith('32') || t.endsWith('33') || t.endsWith('34') || t.endsWith('35')) return 'BDR';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (t.endsWith('3') || t.endsWith('4') || t.endsWith('5') || t.endsWith('6')) return 'ACAO';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          // 3. Palavras-chave para AÇÃO (Baixa prioridade)
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (mercado.includes('AÇÃO') || mercado.includes('AÇÕES') || mercado.includes('VISTA')) return 'ACAO';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          return 'ACAO';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        };
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        for (const row of data) {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          // Mapeamento robusto para B3 e outros formatos (Normalização de chaves para facilitar busca)
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const normalizedRow: Record<string, string | number> = {};
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          for (const key in row) {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(row, key)) {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              normalizedRow[key.toLowerCase().trim().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")] = row[key];
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const tickerRaw = String(
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['ticker'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['codigo de negociacao'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['ativo'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['codigo'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['produto'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            row.Ticker || row['Código de Negociação'] || row['Ativo'] || row['Código'] || row['Produto'] || ''
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          );
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (!tickerRaw || tickerRaw.trim() === '' || tickerRaw.toUpperCase().includes('RENDIMENTO') || tickerRaw.toUpperCase().includes('JUROS')) continue;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          // Limpa ticker (ex: "PETR4 - PETROLEO BRASILEIRO" -> "PETR4")
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const tickerMatch = tickerRaw.match(/[A-Z]{4}[0-9]{1,2}/i);
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const ticker = tickerMatch ? tickerMatch[0].toUpperCase() : tickerRaw.split('-')[0].split(' ')[0].toUpperCase().trim();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const mov = String(
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['tipo'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['movimentacao'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['tipo de movimentacao'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['entrada/saida'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            normalizedRow['operacao'] || 
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            row.Tipo || row['Movimentação'] || row['Tipo de Movimentação'] || row['Entrada/Saída'] || row['Operação'] || ''
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          ).toUpperCase();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          // Se for uma movimentação de dividendos ou taxas, pula
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (mov.includes('DESDOBRAMENTO') || mov.includes('AGRUPAMENTO') || mov.includes('RENDIMENTO') || mov.includes('AMORTIZACAO') || mov.includes('LEILAO')) continue;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const type = (mov.includes('VENDA') || mov.includes('SAIDA') || mov === 'V' || mov.includes('DEBITO')) ? 'SELL' : 'BUY';
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const parseBRNumber = (val: any) => {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return 0;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (typeof val === 'number') return Math.abs(val);
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (typeof val !== 'string') return 0;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            const clean = String(val).replace(/R\$/g, '').replace(/\s/g, '');
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (clean.includes(',') && clean.includes('.')) {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              return Math.abs(parseFloat(clean.replace(/\./g, '').replace(',', '.')));
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            return Math.abs(parseFloat(clean.replace(',', '.')));
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          };
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const rawQuantity = normalizedRow['quantidade'] || normalizedRow['qtde'] || normalizedRow['qtd'] || normalizedRow['qnt'] || row.Quantidade || row.Qty || row.Qtde || row['Qtde.'];
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          let quantity = parseBRNumber(rawQuantity);
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const rawPrice = normalizedRow['preco'] || normalizedRow['valor'] || normalizedRow['preco unitario'] || normalizedRow['preco medio'] || normalizedRow['preco de execucao'] || normalizedRow['valor unitario'] || row.Preço || row.Price || row.Valor || row['Preço Médio'] || row['Preço/Cota'] || row['Valor Operação'];
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          let price = parseBRNumber(rawPrice);
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          // Se a planilha não tem preço, mas tem Quantidade e Total

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            const total = parseBRNumber(normalizedRow['total'] || normalizedRow['valor total'] || row['Valor Total'] || row.Total);
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (quantity > 0) price = total / quantity;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (price === 0 || quantity === 0) {

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const rawDate = normalizedRow['data'] || normalizedRow['data do pregao'] || normalizedRow['data do negocio'] || normalizedRow['data da operacao'] || normalizedRow['data liquidacao'] || row.Data || row['Data do Pregão'] || row.Date || row['Data do Negócio'];
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          let date;
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (typeof rawDate === 'number') {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            const excelEpoch = new Date(1899, 11, 30);
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            date = new Date(excelEpoch.getTime() + rawDate * 86400 * 1000).toISOString();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          } else if (typeof rawDate === 'string') {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            const parts = rawDate.includes('/') ? rawDate.split('/') : rawDate.split('-');
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            if (parts.length === 3) {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              if (parts[0].length === 4) { // YYYY-MM-DD

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:                date = new Date(`${cleanYear}-${parts[1].padStart(2, '0')}-${parts[0].padStart(2, '0')}T12:00:00Z`).toISOString();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            } else {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              date = new Date().toISOString();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          } else if (rawDate instanceof Date) {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            date = rawDate.toISOString();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          } else {
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            date = new Date().toISOString();
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (ticker && quantity > 0) {

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              price,
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:              date
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:            });
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        }
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        if (newTxs.length === 0) throw new Error('Nenhuma transação válida encontrada no arquivo.');
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        if (isConfigured) {

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          if (!user) throw new Error('Usuário não autenticado');
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          const { error } = await supabase.from('transactions').insert(

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        } else {

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:          localStorage.setItem('invest_transactions', JSON.stringify(combined));

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:
src/pages/Transactions.tsx:        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('invest_transactions_updated'));

src/pages/Transactions.tsx:    reader.readAsBinaryString(file);

src/pages/Home.tsx:  
src/pages/Home.tsx:  const [topGainers, setTopGainers] = useState<any[]>([]);

src/pages/Home.tsx:  // Portfolio Stats
src/pages/Home.tsx:  const portfolioStats = useMemo(() => {
src/pages/Home.tsx:    if (!portfolio || portfolio.length === 0) return { total: 0, change: 0, count: 0 };
src/pages/Home.tsx:    
src/pages/Home.tsx:    const total = portfolio.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.currentValue || item.totalInvested), 0);
src/pages/Home.tsx:    const invested = portfolio.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.totalInvested, 0);
src/pages/Home.tsx:    const change = invested > 0 ? ((total / invested) - 1) * 100 : 0;
src/pages/Home.tsx:    
src/pages/Home.tsx:    return {
src/pages/Home.tsx:      total,
src/pages/Home.tsx:      change,
src/pages/Home.tsx:      count: portfolio.length
src/pages/Home.tsx:    };
src/pages/Home.tsx:  }, [portfolio]);
src/pages/Home.tsx:
src/pages/Home.tsx:  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
src/pages/Home.tsx:  const [suggestions, setSuggestions] = useState<any[]>([]);
src/pages/Home.tsx:  const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState(-1);
src/pages/Home.tsx:
src/pages/Home.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/pages/Home.tsx:    if (searchQuery.length > 1) {
src/pages/Home.tsx:      const timer = setTimeout(async () => {
src/pages/Home.tsx:        try {
src/pages/Home.tsx:          const response = await fetch(`/api/search-suggestions?q=${encodeURIComponent(searchQuery)}`);
src/pages/Home.tsx:          const data = await response.json();
src/pages/Home.tsx:          setSuggestions(data);
src/pages/Home.tsx:          setSelectedIndex(-1);
src/pages/Home.tsx:        } catch (err) {
src/pages/Home.tsx:          console.error('Error fetching suggestions:', err);
src/pages/Home.tsx:        }
src/pages/Home.tsx:      }, 200);
src/pages/Home.tsx:      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
src/pages/Home.tsx:    } else {
src/pages/Home.tsx:      setSuggestions([]);
src/pages/Home.tsx:      setSelectedIndex(-1);
src/pages/Home.tsx:    }
src/pages/Home.tsx:  }, [searchQuery]);
src/pages/Home.tsx:
src/pages/Home.tsx:  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
src/pages/Home.tsx:    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
src/pages/Home.tsx:      e.preventDefault();
src/pages/Home.tsx:      setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev < suggestions.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : prev));
src/pages/Home.tsx:    } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
src/pages/Home.tsx:      e.preventDefault();
src/pages/Home.tsx:      setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev > -1 ? prev - 1 : prev));
src/pages/Home.tsx:    } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
src/pages/Home.tsx:      if (selectedIndex >= 0 && suggestions[selectedIndex]) {
src/pages/Home.tsx:        navigate(`/asset/${suggestions[selectedIndex].ticker}`);
src/pages/Home.tsx:        setSearchQuery('');
src/pages/Home.tsx:        setSuggestions([]);
src/pages/Home.tsx:      } else if (searchQuery) {
src/pages/Home.tsx:        navigate(`/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(searchQuery)}`);
src/pages/Home.tsx:        setSuggestions([]);
src/pages/Home.tsx:      }
src/pages/Home.tsx:    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
src/pages/Home.tsx:      setSuggestions([]);
src/pages/Home.tsx:    }
src/pages/Home.tsx:  };
src/pages/Home.tsx:
src/pages/Home.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/pages/Home.tsx:        ]);
src/pages/Home.tsx:        setRankings({

src/pages/Home.tsx:          'FII': fiis.slice(0, 5),
src/pages/Home.tsx:          'CRYPTO': cryptos.slice(0, 5)
src/pages/Home.tsx:        });
src/pages/Home.tsx:      } catch (err) {

src/pages/Home.tsx:      } finally {
src/pages/Home.tsx:        setLoadingRankings(false);

src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:export function PortfolioSummary() {
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const { portfolio, quotaHistory, transactions, dividends } = usePortfolio();
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const totalInvested = portfolio.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.totalInvested, 0);
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const currentTotalValue = portfolio.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.currentValue || item.totalInvested), 0);
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const totalProfit = currentTotalValue - totalInvested;
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const totalProfitPercentage = totalInvested > 0 ? (totalProfit / totalInvested) * 100 : 0;
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  // Calculate monthly dividends using historical quantity for accuracy
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const monthlyDividends = (() => {
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:    const months: Record<string, number> = {};
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:    dividends?.forEach(d => {
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      const date = new Date(d.date);
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      const key = `${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      const qty = getHistoricalQuantity(d.ticker, d.date, portfolio);
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      months[key] = (months[key] || 0) + ((d.amount || 0) * qty);
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:    });
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:    return Object.entries(months)
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      .map(([date, value]) => ({ date, value }))
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      .slice(-6); // Last 6 months
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  })();
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const totalDividends = (dividends || []).reduce((acc, curr) => {
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:    const qty = getHistoricalQuantity(curr.ticker, curr.date, portfolio);
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:    return acc + ((curr.amount || 0) * qty);
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  }, 0);
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const dividendYield = currentTotalValue > 0 ? (totalDividends / currentTotalValue) * 100 : 0;
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:  const allocationData = useMemo(() => {

src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:        existing.value += item.currentValue || item.totalInvested;
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      } else {

src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      }
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:      return acc;
src/components/PortfolioSummary.tsx:    }, []).sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value);

src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:export function ScrollToTop() {
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:  const { pathname, hash } = useLocation();
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    if (hash) {
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:      // Try multiple times to ensure elements are rendered (useful for slow renders)
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:      let attempts = 0;
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:      const tryScroll = () => {
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:        const element = document.getElementById(hash.replace('#', ''));
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:        if (element) {
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:          element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:        } else if (attempts < 10) {
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:          attempts++;
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:          setTimeout(tryScroll, 100);
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:        }
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:      };
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:      tryScroll();
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:      return;
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    }
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    document.body.scrollTo(0, 0);
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    document.documentElement.scrollTo(0, 0);
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    // Fallback for some browsers/containers
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    const main = document.querySelector('main');
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:    if (main) main.scrollTo(0, 0);
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:  }, [pathname, hash]);
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:
src/components/ScrollToTop.tsx:  return null;

src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:import { Transaction, PortfolioItem, CorporateEvent, TaxMonth, PortfolioEngineResult } from '../types';
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:/**
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: * Motor Core de Gestão de Portfólio
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: * Implementa:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: * 1. Preço Médio Ponderado
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: * 2. Eventos Corporativos (Desdobramentos/Grupamentos)
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: * 3. Motor Fiscal (Isenção 20k, Compensação de Prejuízos)
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: * 4. Rentabilidade TWR (Método de Cotas)
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: */
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:/**
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: * Encontra a quantidade de um ativo em uma data específica
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts: */
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:export function getHistoricalQuantity(ticker: string, targetDateStr: string, portfolio: PortfolioItem[]): number {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const item = portfolio.find(p => p.ticker === ticker);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  if (!item || !item.historicalQuantities || item.historicalQuantities.length === 0) return 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const targetTime = new Date(targetDateStr).getTime();
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // As quantidades históricas já vêm ordenadas cronologicamente pelo motor
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // Mas por segurança, garantimos que pegamos a última antes ou na data alvo
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const history = [...item.historicalQuantities].sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date).getTime() - new Date(b.date).getTime());
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const match = [...history].reverse().find(h => new Date(h.date).getTime() <= targetTime);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  return match ? match.quantity : 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:}
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:export function calculateAdvancedPortfolio(
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  transactions: Transaction[],
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  events: CorporateEvent[] = [],
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  currentPrices: Record<string, number> = {}
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:): PortfolioEngineResult {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // 1. Sort everything chronologically, filtering out invalid dates
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const sortedTxs = [...transactions]
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    .filter(t => t.date && !isNaN(new Date(t.date).getTime()))
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    .sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date).getTime() - new Date(b.date).getTime());
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const sortedEvents = [...events]
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    .filter(e => e.date && !isNaN(new Date(e.date).getTime()))
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    .sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date).getTime() - new Date(b.date).getTime());
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // State
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const positions = new Map<string, PortfolioItem>();
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const taxLedger: Record<string, TaxMonth> = {};
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  let accumulatedLossAcoes = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  let accumulatedLossFIIs = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // TWR State
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  let totalQuotas = 1000; // Start with 1000 quotas
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  let quotaValue = 1.0; // Initial quota value
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  let previousPatrimony = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const quotaHistory: { date: string; quotaValue: number; totalPatrimony: number }[] = [];
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // Helper to get or create tax month
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const getTaxMonth = (dateStr: string): TaxMonth => {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    const d = new Date(dateStr);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    const month = `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    if (!taxLedger[month]) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      taxLedger[month] = {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        month,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        salesAcoes: 0, profitAcoes: 0,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        salesFIIs: 0, profitFIIs: 0,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        lossCarryforwardAcoes: 0, lossCarryforwardFIIs: 0,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        taxDueAcoes: 0, taxDueFIIs: 0,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        isExemptAcoes: true
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      };
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    return taxLedger[month];
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  };
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // Combined and sort all events (transactions + corporate events)
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const allEvents: any[] = [
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    ...sortedTxs.map(t => ({ ...t, _type: 'TX' })),
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    ...sortedEvents.map(e => ({ ...e, _type: 'CORP' }))
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  ].sort((a, b) => {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    const timeA = new Date(a.date).getTime();
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    const timeB = new Date(b.date).getTime();
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    if (timeA === timeB) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      // Prioritize CORP events on the same day if they are splits
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      if (a._type === 'CORP' && b._type === 'TX') return -1;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      if (a._type === 'TX' && b._type === 'CORP') return 1;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    return timeA - timeB;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  });
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // Historical quantity tracker per ticker: [ { date, quantity } ]
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const historicalQuantities = new Map<string, { date: string; quantity: number }[]>();
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  for (const ev of allEvents) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    if (ev._type === 'CORP') {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      // Handle Corporate Events (Splits / Inplits)
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      const pos = positions.get(ev.ticker);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      if (pos && pos.totalQuantity > 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        if (ev.type === 'SPLIT' || ev.type === 'INPLIT') {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          const factor = ev.factor || 1;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          pos.totalQuantity = pos.totalQuantity * factor;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          pos.averagePrice = pos.averagePrice / factor;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          // Total invested remains the same
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          // Record quantity change in history
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          const hq = historicalQuantities.get(ev.ticker) || [];
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          hq.push({ date: ev.date, quantity: pos.totalQuantity });
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          historicalQuantities.set(ev.ticker, hq);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    } else if (ev._type === 'TX') {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      const tx = ev as Transaction;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      const pos = positions.get(tx.ticker) || {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        ticker: tx.ticker,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        assetType: tx.assetType,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        totalQuantity: 0,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        averagePrice: 0,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        totalInvested: 0
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      };
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      // TWR Calculation (Before applying transaction)
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      let currentPatrimonyBeforeTx = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      positions.forEach(p => {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const priceAtTime = currentPrices[p.ticker] || p.averagePrice; 
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        currentPatrimonyBeforeTx += p.totalQuantity * priceAtTime;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      });
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      // Update Quota Value based on market movement BEFORE the cash flow
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      if (previousPatrimony > 0 && totalQuotas > 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const potentialQuotaValue = currentPatrimonyBeforeTx / totalQuotas;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        if (!isNaN(potentialQuotaValue) && isFinite(potentialQuotaValue) && potentialQuotaValue > 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          quotaValue = potentialQuotaValue;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      if (tx.type === 'BUY') {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const newTotalQuantity = pos.totalQuantity + tx.quantity;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const newTotalInvested = pos.totalInvested + (tx.quantity * tx.price);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        pos.averagePrice = newTotalQuantity > 0 ? newTotalInvested / newTotalQuantity : 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        pos.totalQuantity = newTotalQuantity;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        pos.totalInvested = newTotalInvested;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const cashInflow = tx.quantity * tx.price;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const newQuotasIssued = quotaValue > 0 ? cashInflow / quotaValue : 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        totalQuotas += newQuotasIssued;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      } else if (tx.type === 'SELL') {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const saleVolume = tx.quantity * tx.price;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const costBasis = tx.quantity * pos.averagePrice;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const profit = saleVolume - costBasis;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        pos.totalQuantity = Math.max(0, pos.totalQuantity - tx.quantity);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        pos.totalInvested = pos.totalQuantity * pos.averagePrice;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const cashOutflow = saleVolume;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const quotasDestroyed = quotaValue > 0 ? cashOutflow / quotaValue : 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        totalQuotas = Math.max(0, totalQuotas - quotasDestroyed);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const taxM = getTaxMonth(tx.date);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        if (tx.assetType === 'ACAO') {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          taxM.salesAcoes += saleVolume;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          taxM.profitAcoes += profit;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        } else if (tx.assetType === 'FII') {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          taxM.salesFIIs += saleVolume;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          taxM.profitFIIs += profit;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      if (pos.totalQuantity > 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        positions.set(tx.ticker, pos);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      } else {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        positions.delete(tx.ticker);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      // Record quantity change in history
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      const hq = historicalQuantities.get(tx.ticker) || [];
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      hq.push({ date: tx.date, quantity: pos.totalQuantity });
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      historicalQuantities.set(tx.ticker, hq);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      // Record TWR History
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      let currentPatrimonyAfterTx = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      positions.forEach(p => {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        const priceAtTime = currentPrices[p.ticker] || p.averagePrice; 
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        currentPatrimonyAfterTx += p.totalQuantity * priceAtTime;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      });
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      previousPatrimony = currentPatrimonyAfterTx;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      quotaHistory.push({
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        date: tx.date,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        quotaValue,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        totalPatrimony: currentPatrimonyAfterTx
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      });
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  // Finalize Tax Ledger
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const sortedMonths = Object.keys(taxLedger).sort();
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  for (const month of sortedMonths) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    const tm = taxLedger[month];
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    tm.isExemptAcoes = tm.salesAcoes <= 20000;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    if (tm.profitAcoes < 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      accumulatedLossAcoes += Math.abs(tm.profitAcoes);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    } else if (tm.profitAcoes > 0 && !tm.isExemptAcoes) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      if (accumulatedLossAcoes > 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        if (accumulatedLossAcoes >= tm.profitAcoes) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          tm.lossCarryforwardAcoes = tm.profitAcoes;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          accumulatedLossAcoes -= tm.profitAcoes;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          tm.profitAcoes = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        } else {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          tm.lossCarryforwardAcoes = accumulatedLossAcoes;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          tm.profitAcoes -= accumulatedLossAcoes;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          accumulatedLossAcoes = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      tm.taxDueAcoes = tm.profitAcoes * 0.15;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    if (tm.profitFIIs < 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      accumulatedLossFIIs += Math.abs(tm.profitFIIs);
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    } else if (tm.profitFIIs > 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      if (accumulatedLossFIIs > 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        if (accumulatedLossFIIs >= tm.profitFIIs) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          tm.lossCarryforwardFIIs = tm.profitFIIs;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          accumulatedLossFIIs -= tm.profitFIIs;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          tm.profitFIIs = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        } else {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          tm.lossCarryforwardFIIs = accumulatedLossFIIs;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          tm.profitFIIs -= accumulatedLossFIIs;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:          accumulatedLossFIIs = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      tm.taxDueFIIs = tm.profitFIIs * 0.20;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  const today = new Date().toISOString();
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  if (quotaHistory.length > 0) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    let todayPatrimony = 0;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    positions.forEach(p => {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      const priceAtTime = currentPrices[p.ticker] || p.averagePrice; 
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      todayPatrimony += p.totalQuantity * priceAtTime;
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    });
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    if (quotaHistory[quotaHistory.length - 1].date.split('T')[0] !== today.split('T')[0]) {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      quotaHistory.push({
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        date: today,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        quotaValue,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:        totalPatrimony: todayPatrimony
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      });
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  }
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  return {
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    currentPositions: Array.from(positions.values()).map(p => ({
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      ...p,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      // Provide historicQuantities so pages can query them
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:      historicalQuantities: historicalQuantities.get(p.ticker) || []
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    })),
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    taxLedger,
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:    quotaHistory
src/lib/portfolioCalc.ts:  };

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:function formatYahooError(error: any): string {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (!error) return 'Erro desconhecido';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Clean up validation errors from yahoo-finance2
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (error.name === 'Failed validation' || (typeof error.message === 'string' && error.message.includes('validation'))) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return 'Yahoo Finance data validation warning (non-critical)';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Handle objects with subErrors or errors array
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const errors = error.errors || error.subErrors || (Array.isArray(error) ? error : null);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (Array.isArray(errors)) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return errors.map((e: any) => e.message || e.description || e.title || (typeof e === 'string' ? e : JSON.stringify(e))).join('; ');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // If it's a string, try to parse it as JSON
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (typeof error === 'string') {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (error.startsWith('{') || error.startsWith('[')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const parsed = JSON.parse(error);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return formatYahooError(parsed);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } catch {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return error;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // If it has a message property
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (error.message) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (typeof error.message === 'string' && (error.message.startsWith('{') || error.message.startsWith('['))) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const parsed = JSON.parse(error.message);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return formatYahooError(parsed);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } catch {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return error.message;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return error.message;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Fallback
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return JSON.stringify(error);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  } catch {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return String(error);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:export function normalizeBRNumber(raw: string): number | string {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (!raw) return '';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Limpeza inicial: remove HTML tags, R$, espaços e converte para maiúsculo
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  let limpo = raw.replace(RE_HTML, '').replace(RE_MOEDA, '').toUpperCase().trim();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (limpo.includes('%')) return limpo;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  let mult = 1;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Detecção de sufixos de magnitude mais flexível (não precisa estar no final exato se houver sujeira)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (limpo.includes('TRILHÃO') || limpo.includes('TRILHÕES') || limpo.includes('TRILHAO') || limpo.includes('TRILHOES')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    mult = 1_000_000_000_000;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    limpo = limpo.replace(/TRILH(Ã|A)O|TRILH(Õ|O)ES/g, '');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  } else if (limpo.includes('BILHÃO') || limpo.includes('BILHÕES') || limpo.includes('BILHAO') || limpo.includes('BILHOES') || limpo.includes('BI') || (limpo.endsWith('B') && !limpo.endsWith('EB'))) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    mult = 1_000_000_000;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    limpo = limpo.replace(/BILH(Ã|A)O|BILH(Õ|O)ES|BI|B/g, '');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  } else if (limpo.includes('MILHÃO') || limpo.includes('MILHÕES') || limpo.includes('MILHAO') || limpo.includes('MILHOES') || limpo.includes('MI') || (limpo.endsWith('M') && !limpo.match(/[A-Z]M$/))) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    mult = 1_000_000;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    limpo = limpo.replace(/MILH(Ã|A)O|MILH(Õ|O)ES|MI|M/g, '');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  } else if (limpo.endsWith('K')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    mult = 1_000;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    limpo = limpo.slice(0, -1);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Se houver múltiplos pontos e uma vírgula, o ponto é milhar e vírgula é decimal (Padrão BR)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Se houver apenas um separador e ele for ponto, pode ser decimal (Padrão US/Global)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const dots = (limpo.match(/\./g) || []).length;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const commas = (limpo.match(/,/g) || []).length;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (commas === 1) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // Padrão Brasileiro: 1.234,56
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    limpo = limpo.replace(RE_MILHAR, '').replace(RE_DECIMAL, '.');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  } else if (commas === 0 && dots === 1) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // Padrão Americano ou Simples: 1234.56
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // Não mexer, parseFloat resolve
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  } else if (commas === 0 && dots > 1) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // Padrão Brasileiro sem centavos: 1.234.567
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    limpo = limpo.replace(RE_MILHAR, '');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const num = parseFloat(limpo);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  return isNaN(num) ? raw.trim() : num * mult;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:export function inferAssetType(ticker: string): ExtendedAssetType {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const clean = canonicalizeTicker(ticker);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (!clean) return 'ACAO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Crypto detection
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (clean.includes('-USD') || clean.includes('-BTC') || clean.includes('-ETH')) return 'CRYPTO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // BDR detection (usually 4 letters + 34/35)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (RE_BDR.test(clean)) return 'BDR';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // FII and ETF detection (ends in 11)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (clean.endsWith('11')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return ETFS_CONHECIDOS.has(clean) ? 'ETF' : 'FII';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // FII detection (ends in 12)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (clean.endsWith('12')) return 'FII';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Brazilian Stocks (4 letters + number 3, 4, 5, 6)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (/^[A-Z]{4}[3-6]$/.test(clean)) return 'ACAO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // US Stocks (1-5 letters, no numbers at the end)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (/^[A-Z]{1,5}$/.test(clean)) return 'STOCK';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  return 'ACAO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:export function canonicalizeTicker(raw: string): string {

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (marketTickers.includes(clean)) return null;

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  return Math.random() * Math.min(cap, base * 2 ** attempt);

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:class LRUCache<V> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private mapa = new Map<string, { data: V; expiresAt: number; staleAt: number }>();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  constructor(private maxSize: number) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (maxSize < 1) throw new RangeError('LRUCache: maxSize deve ser >= 1');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  get(key: string): { data: V; isStale: boolean } | null {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const entry = this.mapa.get(key);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (!entry) return null;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const now = Date.now();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (now > entry.expiresAt) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this.mapa.delete(key);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return null;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.mapa.delete(key);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.mapa.set(key, entry);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return { data: entry.data, isStale: now > entry.staleAt };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  set(key: string, data: V, staleMs: number, ttlMs: number): void {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (this.mapa.has(key)) this.mapa.delete(key);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    else if (this.mapa.size >= this.maxSize) this.mapa.delete(this.mapa.keys().next().value!);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const now = Date.now();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.mapa.set(key, { data, staleAt: now + staleMs, expiresAt: now + ttlMs });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  delete(key: string): boolean { return this.mapa.delete(key); }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  clear(): void                { this.mapa.clear(); }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  get tamanho(): number        { return this.mapa.size; }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  get tamanhoMax(): number     { return this.maxSize; }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:class DomainRateLimiter {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private tokens: number;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private lastRefill: number;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  constructor(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    private readonly rps: number = 2,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    private readonly burst: number = 5
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  ) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.tokens = burst;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.lastRefill = performance.now();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  async acquire(): Promise<void> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    while (true) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this.refill();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (this.tokens >= 1) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        this.tokens -= 1;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private refill(): void {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const now = performance.now();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const elapsedMs = now - this.lastRefill;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const newTokens = elapsedMs * (this.rps / 1000);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (newTokens > 0) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this.tokens = Math.min(this.burst, this.tokens + newTokens);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this.lastRefill = now;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:type CBState = 'FECHADO' | 'ABERTO' | 'SEMI_ABERTO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:class CircuitBreaker {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private state: CBState = 'FECHADO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private failures = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private lastFailureTime = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private successCount = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  constructor(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    private threshold: number = 3,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    private resetMs:   number = 30_000,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  ) {}
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  getState(): CBState { return this.state; }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  isOpen(): boolean {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (this.state === 'ABERTO') {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (Date.now() - this.lastFailureTime > this.resetMs) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        this.state = 'SEMI_ABERTO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return false;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return true;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return false;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  recordSuccess(): void {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (this.state === 'SEMI_ABERTO') {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this.successCount++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (this.successCount >= 2) this.reset();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } else {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this.failures = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  recordFailure(): void {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.failures++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.lastFailureTime = Date.now();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.successCount = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (this.failures >= this.threshold) this.state = 'ABERTO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  reset(): void {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.state    = 'FECHADO';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.failures = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.successCount = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this.lastFailureTime = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  getFalhas(): number { return this.failures; }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:const _hostnameCache = new Map<string, string>();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:function extractHostname(url?: string | null): string {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (!url) return '';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const match = url.match(/^https?:\/\/[^\/]+/);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const origin = match ? match[0] : url;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  let h = _hostnameCache.get(origin);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (h) return h;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  try { h = new URL(url).hostname; } catch { h = url; }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (_hostnameCache.size >= 64) _hostnameCache.delete(_hostnameCache.keys().next().value!);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  _hostnameCache.set(origin, h);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  return h;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:function getStealthHeaders(url: string): Record<string, string> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const hostname = extractHostname(url);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const lang = Math.random() > 0.5

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    'Accept-Encoding'          : 'gzip, deflate, br',

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    'Pragma'                   : 'no-cache',
