src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:// 8. UNIVERSAL LEXER
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:const _regexCache = new Map<string, RegExp>();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:function getGlobalRegex(source: string): RegExp {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  let r = _regexCache.get(source);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (!r) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    r = new RegExp(source, 'g');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    _regexCache.set(source, r);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  r.lastIndex = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  return r;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:export function universalLexer<T = any>(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  html: string,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  template: ExtractorTemplate<T>,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  existingResults: Partial<T> = {},
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:): Partial<T> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const results: any = { ...existingResults };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const htmlLower = html.toLowerCase();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  // Extração especial para dividendos (tabelas)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  if (html.includes('table-dividends') || html.includes('dividendos') || html.includes('rendimentos')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // Regex flexível para: <td> ... </td> com <td class="..."> e <tr class="..."> ignorados
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const rowRegex = /<tr[^>]*>\s*<td[^>]*>([\d\/]+)<\/td>\s*<td[^>]*>([\w\d\/.-]*|-)<\/td>\s*<td[^>]*>([R$\s\d,.]+)<\/td>\s*<td[^>]*>([^<]+)<\/td>\s*<\/tr>/gi;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const matches = [...html.matchAll(rowRegex)];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (matches.length > 0) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      results.dividendos = matches.slice(0, 50).map(m => ({
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        dataCom: m[1].trim(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        pagamento: m[2].trim(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        valor: m[3].trim(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        tipo: m[4].trim()
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } else {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Investidor10 format: Tipo | Data Com | Pagamento | Valor
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const altRowRegex = /<tr[^>]*>\s*<td[^>]*>([\w\s.]+)<\/td>\s*<td[^>]*>([\d\/]+)<\/td>\s*<td[^>]*>([\w\d\/.-]*|-)<\/td>\s*<td[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/td>\s*<\/tr>/gi;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const altMatches = [...html.matchAll(altRowRegex)];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (altMatches.length > 0) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        results.dividendos = altMatches.slice(0, 50).map(m => ({
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          tipo: m[1].trim(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          dataCom: m[2].trim(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          pagamento: m[3].trim(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          valor: m[4].replace(/\\n/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '').trim()
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  for (const rule of template.rules) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (results[rule.name] !== undefined && !rule.multiple) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    for (const anchor of rule.anchors) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const anchorLower = anchor.toLowerCase();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let idx = htmlLower.indexOf(`>${anchorLower}<`);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (idx === -1) idx = htmlLower.indexOf(`"${anchorLower}"`);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (idx === -1) idx = htmlLower.indexOf(`>${anchorLower} `);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (idx === -1) idx = htmlLower.indexOf(anchorLower);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (idx === -1) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const chunkSize = rule.multiple ? 3000 : 400;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const chunk = html.slice(idx, idx + chunkSize);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (rule.multiple) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const gRegex = getGlobalRegex(rule.extractRegex.source);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const matches = [...chunk.matchAll(gRegex)];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (matches.length > 0) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          results[rule.name] = matches
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .map(m => m[1]?.trim())
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .filter((val): val is string => !!val && !VALORES_INVALIDOS.has(val))
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .map(val => rule.formatter ? rule.formatter(val) : val);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const match = chunk.match(rule.extractRegex);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (match?.[1]) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const raw = match[1].trim();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (!VALORES_INVALIDOS.has(raw)) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            results[rule.name] = rule.formatter ? rule.formatter(raw) : raw;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  return results as Partial<T>;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:async function yahooQuote(ticker: string, _timeoutMs: number): Promise<YahooQuoteData | null> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const symbols = [`${ticker}.SA`, ticker.toUpperCase()];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  for (const symbol of symbols) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const quote = await yahooFinance.quote(symbol);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (!quote) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Check for errors in the response object (some versions/cases return errors instead of throwing)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if ((quote as any).errors || (quote as any).error) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        console.warn(`[YAHOO] Quote for ${symbol} returned errors:`, formatYahooError((quote as any).errors || (quote as any).error));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (!(quote as any).regularMarketPrice) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const q = quote as any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        regularMarketPrice:          q.regularMarketPrice,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        regularMarketChangePercent:  q.regularMarketChangePercent,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        trailingPE:                  q.trailingPE,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        priceToBook:                 q.priceToBook,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        bookValue:                   q.bookValue,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        epsTrailingTwelveMonths:     q.epsTrailingTwelveMonths,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        trailingAnnualDividendYield: q.trailingAnnualDividendYield,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        marketCap:                   q.marketCap,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        longName:                    q.longName,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        shortName:                   q.shortName,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } catch (e) { 
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      console.warn(`[YAHOO] Erro ao buscar quote para ${symbol}:`, formatYahooError(e));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      continue; 
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  return null;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:async function yahooFundamentals(ticker: string, _timeoutMs: number): Promise<YahooFundamentalsData> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  const symbols  = [`${ticker}.SA`, ticker.toUpperCase()];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  for (const symbol of symbols) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const result = await yahooFinance.quoteSummary(symbol, {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        modules: ['financialData', 'defaultKeyStatistics', 'assetProfile']
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (!result) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Check for errors in the response object
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if ((result as any).errors || (result as any).error) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        console.warn(`[YAHOO] Fundamentals for ${symbol} returned errors:`, formatYahooError((result as any).errors || (result as any).error));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const res = result as any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const fd = res?.financialData;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const ks = res?.defaultKeyStatistics;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const ap = res?.assetProfile;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (!fd && !ks && !ap) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        profitMargins:    fd?.profitMargins,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        returnOnEquity:   fd?.returnOnEquity,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        revenuePerShare:  fd?.revenuePerShare,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        returnOnAssets:   fd?.returnOnAssets,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        grossMargins:     fd?.grossMargins,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        operatingMargins: fd?.operatingMargins,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        debtToEquity:     fd?.debtToEquity,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        // Novos campos
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        about:            ap?.longBusinessSummary,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sector:           ap?.sector,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        subSector:        ap?.industry,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        enterpriseValue:  ks?.enterpriseValue,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        forwardPE:        ks?.forwardPE,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        pegRatio:         ks?.pegRatio,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } catch (e) { 
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      console.warn(`[YAHOO] Erro ao buscar fundamentos para ${symbol}:`, formatYahooError(e));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      continue; 
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  return {};
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:}

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:export class NexusEngine {

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _cache           = new LRUCache<any>(300);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _circuitBreakers = new Map<string, CircuitBreaker>();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _startTime       = Date.now();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _totalRequests   = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _totalSuccess    = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _totalFailures   = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _sessionMetrics  = { cacheHits: 0, cacheStale: 0, cacheMisses: 0 };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _options: Required<NexusEngineOptions> = {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    cacheTtlMs:       24 * 60 * 60 * 1_000,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    cacheStaleMs:     5  * 60 * 1_000,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    maxRetries:       3,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    retryBaseDelay:   500,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    fetchTimeoutMs:   10_000,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    concurrencyLimit: 15,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    domainRps:        2,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    domainBurst:      5,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static _rateLimiters = new Map<string, DomainRateLimiter>();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static configure(opts: NexusEngineOptions): void {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this._options = { ...this._options, ...opts };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this._rateLimiters.clear();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static getRateLimiter(domain: string): DomainRateLimiter {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    let limiter = this._rateLimiters.get(domain);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (!limiter) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      limiter = new DomainRateLimiter(this._options.domainRps, this._options.domainBurst);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this._rateLimiters.set(domain, limiter);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return limiter;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static getCB(domain: string): CircuitBreaker {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (!this._circuitBreakers.has(domain)) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this._circuitBreakers.set(domain, new CircuitBreaker());
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return this._circuitBreakers.get(domain)!;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static resetCircuitBreaker(domain: string): void {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this._circuitBreakers.get(domain)?.reset();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static async fetchWithJitter(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    url: string,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    requireStealth: boolean,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  ): Promise<Response> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    let lastErr: Error = new Error('fetch falhou');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const hostname = extractHostname(url);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const domain   = hostname.replace('www.', '').split('.')[0];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const limiter  = this.getRateLimiter(domain);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < this._options.maxRetries; attempt++) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      await limiter.acquire();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const ctrl  = new AbortController();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const timer = setTimeout(() => ctrl.abort(), this._options.fetchTimeoutMs);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const res = await fetch(url, {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          signal:  ctrl.signal,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          headers: requireStealth ? getStealthHeaders(url) : { 'User-Agent': getRandomAgent() },
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        clearTimeout(timer);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (res.status === 404 || res.status === 451) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (res.status === 410) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          console.warn(`Resource gone (410): ${url}`);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          return res; // Or handle as needed, e.g., return null or empty response
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return res;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } catch (err) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        clearTimeout(timer);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        lastErr = err as Error;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (lastErr.message.includes('Critical')) throw lastErr;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (attempt < this._options.maxRetries - 1) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, backoffMs(attempt, this._options.retryBaseDelay)));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    throw lastErr;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async fetchHistoricalFundamentals(ticker: string) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const cleanTicker = canonicalizeTicker(ticker);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const symbols = [`${cleanTicker}.SA`, cleanTicker];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    for (const symbol of symbols) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const result = await yahooFinance.quoteSummary(symbol, {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          modules: ['incomeStatementHistory', 'balanceSheetHistory', 'earningsHistory', 'defaultKeyStatistics']
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!result) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if ((result as any).errors || (result as any).error) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const res = result as any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const incomeHistory = res?.incomeStatementHistory?.incomeStatementHistory || [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const balanceHistory = res?.balanceSheetHistory?.balanceSheetStatements || [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        // Combine by year
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const historyData: any[] = [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        incomeHistory.forEach((inc: any) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const dt = inc.endDate;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (dt) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const year = dt.getFullYear();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            historyData.push({
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              year,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              revenue: inc.totalRevenue,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              netIncome: inc.netIncome || inc.netIncomeApplicableToCommonShares,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              ebitda: inc.ebitda || inc.ebit
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        // Merge balance sheet data
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        balanceHistory.forEach((bal: any) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const dt = bal.endDate;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (dt) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const year = dt.getFullYear();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            let existing = historyData.find(h => h.year === year);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            if (!existing) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              existing = { year };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              historyData.push(existing);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            existing.patrimony = bal.totalStockholderEquity;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            existing.totalAssets = bal.totalAssets;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            existing.totalLiabilities = bal.totalLiab;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (historyData.length > 0) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          return historyData.sort((a, b) => a.year - b.year);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } catch (e) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async execute<T>(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    sources: ScrapeSource<T>[],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  ): Promise<{ data: Partial<T>; bytes: number; earlyAbort: boolean; cacheStatus: string }> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const cacheKey = `nexus:${sources.map(s => s.url).join('|')}`;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const cached   = this._cache.get(cacheKey);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (cached) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (cached.isStale) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        this._sessionMetrics.cacheStale++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!this._tickerInFlight.has(cacheKey)) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const bg = this._executeNetwork(sources)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .then(fresh => this._cache.set(cacheKey, fresh, this._options.cacheStaleMs, this._options.cacheTtlMs))
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .catch(() => {});
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          this._tickerInFlight.set(cacheKey, bg);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          bg.finally(() => this._tickerInFlight.delete(cacheKey));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return { ...cached.data, cacheStatus: 'STALE' };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this._sessionMetrics.cacheHits++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return { ...cached.data, cacheStatus: 'HIT' };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const inflight = this._tickerInFlight.get(cacheKey);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (inflight) return inflight;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this._sessionMetrics.cacheMisses++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const p = this._executeNetwork(sources).then(fresh => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this._cache.set(cacheKey, fresh, this._options.cacheStaleMs, this._options.cacheTtlMs);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return { ...fresh, cacheStatus: 'MISS' };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    this._tickerInFlight.set(cacheKey, p);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    p.finally(() => this._tickerInFlight.delete(cacheKey));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return p;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static async _executeNetwork<T>(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    sources: ScrapeSource<T>[],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  ): Promise<{ data: Partial<T>; bytes: number; earlyAbort: boolean }> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    let lastErr: Error = new Error('Nenhuma fonte disponível');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    let openCBs = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    for (const source of sources) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const hostname = extractHostname(source.url);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const domain   = hostname.replace('www.', '').split('.')[0];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const cb       = this.getCB(domain);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (cb.isOpen()) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        openCBs++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        let fetchPromise = this._urlInFlight.get(source.url);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!fetchPromise) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          this._totalRequests++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          fetchPromise = this._streamAndParse<T>(source, cb);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          this._urlInFlight.set(source.url, fetchPromise);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          fetchPromise.finally(() => this._urlInFlight.delete(source.url));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return await fetchPromise;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } catch (err) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        lastErr = err as Error;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (lastErr.message.includes('Critical')) break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (openCBs === sources.length && sources.length > 0) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      throw new Error(`Todos os Circuit Breakers abertos (${openCBs}/${sources.length} fontes)`);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    throw new Error(`Falha total: ${lastErr.message}`);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  private static async _streamAndParse<T>(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    source: ScrapeSource<T>,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    cb: CircuitBreaker,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  ): Promise<{ data: Partial<T>; bytes: number; earlyAbort: boolean }> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const res = await this.fetchWithJitter(source.url, !!source.requireStealth);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (res.status === 410) return { data: {}, bytes: 0, earlyAbort: true };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (!res.body) throw new Error('No response body');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const reader  = res.body.getReader();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const decoder = new TextDecoder();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let htmlBuffer = '';
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let rawData: Partial<T> = {};
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let bytesRead  = 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let earlyAbort = false;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const MAX_WINDOW   = 20_000;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const MAX_ANCHOR   = source.template.rules.reduce((max, r) => r.anchors.reduce((m, a) => Math.max(m, a.length), max), 0);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const OVERLAP_SIZE = Math.max(MAX_ANCHOR + 256, 512);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        while (true) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const { done, value } = await reader.read();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (done) break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          bytesRead  += value.length;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          htmlBuffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (htmlBuffer.length > MAX_WINDOW) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            htmlBuffer = htmlBuffer.slice(-(MAX_WINDOW - OVERLAP_SIZE));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          rawData = universalLexer<T>(htmlBuffer, source.template, rawData);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const hasAll = source.template.rules.every(r => rawData[r.name as keyof T] !== undefined);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (hasAll) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            reader.cancel().catch(() => {});
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            earlyAbort = true;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!earlyAbort) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const tail = decoder.decode();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (tail) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            htmlBuffer += tail;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            rawData = universalLexer<T>(htmlBuffer, source.template, rawData);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } finally {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        try { reader.releaseLock(); } catch { /* ignore */ }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      cb.recordSuccess();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this._totalSuccess++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return { data: rawData, bytes: bytesRead, earlyAbort };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } catch (err) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      cb.recordFailure();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this._totalFailures++;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      throw err;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async fetchNews(ticker: string): Promise<NewsItem[]> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const clean = canonicalizeTicker(ticker);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Usando um timeout menor e headers mais realistas
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const res = await fetch(`https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=${clean}+acao+OR+fii+OR+b3&hl=pt-BR&gl=BR&ceid=BR:pt-419`, {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        headers: { 'User-Agent': getRandomAgent() }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (!res.ok) return [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const xml = await res.text();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const items: NewsItem[] = [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Regex mais robusto para capturar itens
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const itemRegex = /<item>([\s\S]*?)<\/item>/g;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let match;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      while ((match = itemRegex.exec(xml)) !== null && items.length < 8) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const itemXml = match[1];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const titleMatch = /<title>(?:<!\[CDATA\[)?([\s\S]*?)(?:\]\]>)?<\/title>/.exec(itemXml);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const linkMatch = /<link>(?:<!\[CDATA\[)?([\s\S]*?)(?:\]\]>)?<\/link>/.exec(itemXml);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const pubDateMatch = /<pubDate>(?:<!\[CDATA\[)?([\s\S]*?)(?:\]\]>)?<\/pubDate>/.exec(itemXml);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const sourceMatch = /<source[^>]*>(?:<!\[CDATA\[)?([\s\S]*?)(?:\]\]>)?<\/source>/.exec(itemXml);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (titleMatch && linkMatch) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          // Limpeza básica de HTML entities
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const cleanTitle = titleMatch[1]
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .replace(/&amp;/g, '&')
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .replace(/&apos;/g, "'")
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .replace(/&lt;/g, '<')
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .replace(/&gt;/g, '>')
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            .replace(/ - [^-]+$/, ''); // Remove o nome da fonte do título se estiver no final (padrão Google News)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          items.push({
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            title: cleanTitle,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            link: linkMatch[1],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            pubDate: pubDateMatch ? new Date(pubDateMatch[1]) : undefined,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            source: sourceMatch ? sourceMatch[1] : undefined,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return items;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } catch (e) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      console.error(`[Nexus] Error fetching news for ${ticker}:`, e);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          } catch (err) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            console.warn(`[Nexus] Failed to fetch ticker ${ticker} for ranking:`, err);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            return null;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        })
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      );
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const filteredResults = results.filter(r => r !== null) as any[];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Ordenação baseada na categoria
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let sorted = [...filteredResults];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const cat = category.toLowerCase();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (cat.includes('dividend') || cat.includes('yield') || cat.includes('bazin')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.sort((a, b) => safeParse(b.raw?.dividendYield) - safeParse(a.raw?.dividendYield));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.dividendYield || '0,00%');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else if (cat.includes('pl') || cat.includes('baratas') || cat.includes('graham')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (cat.includes('graham')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          // Graham Formula: sqrt(22.5 * VPA * LPA)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          sorted.forEach(s => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const vpa = safeParse(s.raw?.vpa);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const lpa = safeParse(s.raw?.lpa);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            if (vpa > 0 && lpa > 0) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              const grahamValue = Math.sqrt(22.5 * vpa * lpa);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              const preco = safeParse(s.raw?.precoAtual);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              const discount = preco > 0 ? ((grahamValue - preco) / grahamValue) * 100 : 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              s.value = `R$ ${grahamValue.toFixed(2)}`;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              s.subValue = `${discount.toFixed(1)}% de desconto`;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              s.sortVal = discount;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            } else {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              s.sortVal = -999;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          sorted.sort((a, b) => b.sortVal - a.sortVal);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        } else {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          sorted.sort((a, b) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const v1 = safeParse(a.raw?.pl) || 999;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const v2 = safeParse(b.raw?.pl) || 999;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            return (v1 > 0 && v2 > 0) ? v1 - v2 : v2 - v1;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.pl || 'N/A');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else if (cat.includes('altas') || cat.includes('flame')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.sort((a, b) => safeParse(b.raw?.variacaoDay) - safeParse(a.raw?.variacaoDay));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.variacaoDay || '0,00%');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else if (cat.includes('roe') || cat.includes('trophy')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.sort((a, b) => safeParse(b.raw?.roe) - safeParse(a.raw?.roe));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.roe || '0,00%');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else if (cat.includes('margem') || cat.includes('pie')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.sort((a, b) => safeParse(b.raw?.margemLiquida) - safeParse(a.raw?.margemLiquida));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.margemLiquida || '0,00%');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else if (cat.includes('pvp')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.sort((a, b) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const v1 = safeParse(a.raw?.pvp) || 999;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const v2 = safeParse(b.raw?.pvp) || 999;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          return (v1 > 0 && v2 > 0) ? v1 - v2 : v2 - v1;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.pvp || 'N/A');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else if (cat.includes('capitalização') || cat.includes('maiores')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.sort((a, b) => (b.raw?.marketCap || 0) - (a.raw?.marketCap || 0));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.marketCap ? `R$ ${(s.raw.marketCap / 1e9).toFixed(2)}B` : 'N/A');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else if (cat.includes('prejuízo') || cat.includes('buy and hold')) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        // Filter by positive margins and ROE
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted = sorted.filter(s => safeParse(s.raw?.margemLiquida) > 0 && safeParse(s.raw?.roe) > 0);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.sort((a, b) => safeParse(b.raw?.roe) - safeParse(a.raw?.roe));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.roe || '0,00%');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } else {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        // Default sorting by DY if unknown
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.sort((a, b) => safeParse(b.raw?.dividendYield) - safeParse(a.raw?.dividendYield));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        sorted.forEach(s => s.value = s.raw?.dividendYield || '0,00%');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const finalData = sorted.slice(0, 50);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      this._cache.set(cacheKey, { data: finalData, timestamp: Date.now() }, this._options.cacheStaleMs, this._options.cacheTtlMs);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return finalData;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } catch (e) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      console.error(`[Nexus] Error fetching ranking ${category}:`, e);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async searchSuggestions(query: string) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const q = query.toUpperCase();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const result = await yahooFinance.search(q);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (result && (result as any).errors) {

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Prioritize Brazilian assets if query looks like a ticker
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let quotes = (result as any).quotes || [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (/^[A-Z]{4}[0-9]{1,2}$/.test(q)) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        quotes = quotes.sort((a: any, b: any) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const aIsBr = a.symbol.endsWith('.SA');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const bIsBr = b.symbol.endsWith('.SA');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (aIsBr && !bIsBr) return -1;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (!aIsBr && bIsBr) return 1;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          return 0;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return quotes.slice(0, 6).map((q: any) => ({
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        ticker: q.symbol.replace('.SA', ''),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        name: q.shortname || q.longname || q.symbol,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        type: q.quoteType || 'EQUITY'
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } catch (error) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      console.error('Error in searchSuggestions:', error);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async fetchAtivo(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    ticker: string,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    type: ExtendedAssetType = 'ACAO',
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    includeNews = false,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  ): Promise<{
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    ticker: string;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    results: any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    cacheStatus: string;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    news?: NewsItem[];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    metrics: any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    type: ExtendedAssetType;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const cleanTicker = canonicalizeTicker(ticker);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const erroVal     = validarTicker(cleanTicker);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (erroVal) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return { ticker: cleanTicker, results: {}, cacheStatus: 'ERROR', metrics: { error: erroVal }, type };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const preset  = ASSET_PRESETS[type] || ASSET_PRESETS.ACAO;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const t       = cleanTicker.toLowerCase();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const sources: ScrapeSource<any>[] = preset ? [
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        { url: `${preset.i10Base}/${t}/`, template: preset.template, requireStealth: true },
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      ] : [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const startTime = performance.now();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const startCpu  = safeCpuStart();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const [scrapeResult, yahooResult, yahooFund, newsResult] = await Promise.allSettled([
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        this.execute(sources),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        yahooQuote(cleanTicker, this._options.fetchTimeoutMs),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        yahooFundamentals(cleanTicker, this._options.fetchTimeoutMs),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        includeNews ? this.fetchNews(cleanTicker) : Promise.resolve(undefined),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      ]);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const scrape   = scrapeResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? scrapeResult.value : { data: {}, bytes: 0, earlyAbort: false, cacheStatus: 'ERROR' };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const quote    = yahooResult.status  === 'fulfilled' ? yahooResult.value  : null;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const fund     = yahooFund.status    === 'fulfilled' ? yahooFund.value    : {};
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const newsData = newsResult.status   === 'fulfilled' ? newsResult.value   : undefined;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const combined = { ...scrape.data } as Record<string, any>;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Prefer Yahoo for price and day variation as it's more reliable for real-time data
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // but keep scrapers as fallback
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (quote) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const q = quote as any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        combined['precoAtual'] = q.regularMarketPrice;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        combined['variacaoDay'] = q.regularMarketChangePercent != null
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          ? q.regularMarketChangePercent.toFixed(2) + '%' 
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          : combined['variacaoDay'];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        combined['name'] = q.longName || q.shortName || combined['name'];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        // Fill other fundamental data if missing
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const fillIfMissing = (k: string, v: any) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          if (combined[k] === undefined && v != null) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            combined[k] = typeof v === 'number' ? v.toFixed(2) : String(v).trim();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fillIfMissing('pl', q.trailingPE);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fillIfMissing('pvp', q.priceToBook);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fillIfMissing('vpa', q.bookValue);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fillIfMissing('lpa', q.epsTrailingTwelveMonths);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fillIfMissing('dividendYield', q.trailingAnnualDividendYield != null
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          ? (q.trailingAnnualDividendYield * 100).toFixed(2) + '%' : undefined);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fillIfMissing('marketCap', q.marketCap);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // Prefer scraped market properties over Yahoo as they are usually more specific to the B3 market
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (combined['valorMercado']) combined['marketCap'] = combined['valorMercado'];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (combined['patrimonioLiquido']) combined['equity'] = combined['patrimonioLiquido'];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const fill = (k: string, v: unknown) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (combined[k] !== undefined || v == null) return;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const s = typeof v === 'number' ? v.toFixed(2) : String(v).trim();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!VALORES_INVALIDOS.has(s)) combined[k] = s;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (quote) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const q = quote as any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('precoAtual',    q.regularMarketPrice);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('variacaoDay',   q.regularMarketChangePercent != null
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          ? q.regularMarketChangePercent.toFixed(2) + '%' : undefined);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('pl',            q.trailingPE);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('pvp',           q.priceToBook);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('vpa',           q.bookValue);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('lpa',           q.epsTrailingTwelveMonths);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('dividendYield', q.trailingAnnualDividendYield != null
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          ? (q.trailingAnnualDividendYield * 100).toFixed(2) + '%' : undefined);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('marketCap',     q.marketCap);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('name',          q.longName || q.shortName);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (fund) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        fill('margemLiquida',  fund.profitMargins    != null ? (fund.profitMargins    * 100).toFixed(2) + '%' : undefined);

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const totalTimeMs = performance.now() - startTime;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const sources_used: string[] = [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (scrapeResult.status === 'fulfilled' && Object.keys(scrape.data).length > 0) sources_used.push('Scraper');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (quote) sources_used.push('YahooFinance');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (Object.keys(fund).length) sources_used.push('YahooFundamentals');

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        results:     combined,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        cacheStatus: scrape.cacheStatus || 'MISS',
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        ...(newsData ? { news: newsData } : {}),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        type,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        metrics: {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          totalTimeMs,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          bytesProcessed:    scrape.bytes,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          foundKeys:         Object.keys(combined),

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          earlyAbort:        scrape.earlyAbort,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          source:            sources_used.join(' + ') || 'None',
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          cpuUsageMs:        safeCpuDeltaMs(startCpu),

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async fetchHistoricoGrafico(ticker: string, range: string = '1y', interval: string = '1d'): Promise<any[]> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const cleanTicker = canonicalizeTicker(ticker);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const symbols = [`${cleanTicker}.SA`, cleanTicker];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // Calculate period1 based on range
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const now = new Date();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    let period1: Date;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    switch (range) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case '1d': period1 = new Date(now.getTime() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000); break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case '5d': period1 = new Date(now.getTime() - 5 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000); break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case '1mo': 
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case '1m': period1 = new Date(new Date().setMonth(now.getMonth() - 1)); break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case '6mo':
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case '6m': period1 = new Date(new Date().setMonth(now.getMonth() - 6)); break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case '1y': period1 = new Date(new Date().setFullYear(now.getFullYear() - 1)); break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case '5y': period1 = new Date(new Date().setFullYear(now.getFullYear() - 5)); break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      case 'max': period1 = new Date(0); break;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      default: period1 = new Date(new Date().setFullYear(now.getFullYear() - 1));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    for (const symbol of symbols) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const result = await yahooFinance.chart(symbol, {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          period1: period1,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          interval: interval as any
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!result) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if ((result as any).errors || (result as any).error) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          console.warn(`[YAHOO] Chart for ${symbol} returned errors:`, formatYahooError((result as any).errors || (result as any).error));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!(result as any).quotes || (result as any).quotes.length === 0) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return (result as any).quotes.map((q: any) => ({
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          date: q.date.toISOString(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          open: q.open,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          high: q.high,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          low: q.low,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          close: q.close,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          volume: q.volume,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        })).filter((d: any) => d.close !== null && d.close !== undefined);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } catch (e) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        console.warn(`[YAHOO] Erro ao buscar histórico para ${symbol}:`, formatYahooError(e));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async fetchDividends(ticker: string): Promise<any[]> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const cleanTicker = canonicalizeTicker(ticker);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const assetType = inferAssetType(cleanTicker);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const isBrazilian = /^[A-Z]{4}[3-6]$/.test(cleanTicker) || cleanTicker.endsWith('11') || cleanTicker.endsWith('12');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // Para ativos brasileiros, tentamos primeiro o Scraper (Investidor10)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // pois o Yahoo Finance é instável com dividendos brasileiros (especialmente FIIs)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    if (isBrazilian) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const scrapeResult = await this.fetchAtivo(cleanTicker, assetType);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (scrapeResult.results && scrapeResult.results.dividendos && scrapeResult.results.dividendos.length > 0) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          return scrapeResult.results.dividendos.map((d: any) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            // Converter data brasileira DD/MM/YYYY para ISO
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const [day, month, year] = d.dataCom.split('/');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const date = new Date(`${year}-${month}-${day}T12:00:00Z`);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            let paymentDate = null;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            if (d.pagamento && d.pagamento !== '-') {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              const [pDay, pMonth, pYear] = d.pagamento.split('/');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              if (pDay && pMonth && pYear) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:                paymentDate = new Date(`${pYear}-${pMonth}-${pDay}T12:00:00Z`).toISOString();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            // Limpar valor (R$ 0,50 -> 0.50)
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const amount = typeof d.valor === 'string' 
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              ? parseFloat(d.valor.replace('R$', '').replace(/\./g, '').replace(',', '.').trim())
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              : d.valor;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            return {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              date: date.toISOString(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              paymentDate: paymentDate || date.toISOString(), // Fallback to Ex-Date if missing
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              dataCom: date.toISOString(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              amount: isNaN(amount) ? 0 : amount,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              type: d.tipo || 'ACAO'
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }).sort((a: any, b: any) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } catch (err) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        console.warn(`[SCRAPER] Falha ao raspar dividendos para ${cleanTicker}:`, err);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    // Fallback ou padrão para ativos internacionais: Yahoo Finance
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const symbols = [isBrazilian ? `${cleanTicker}.SA` : cleanTicker, cleanTicker];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    for (const symbol of symbols) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const result = await yahooFinance.chart(symbol, {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          period1: '5y',
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          interval: '1mo',
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          events: 'div'
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!result) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if ((result as any).errors || (result as any).error) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const events = (result as any)?.events?.dividends;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (!events || events.length === 0) continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return events.map((d: any) => ({
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          date: d.date.toISOString(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          paymentDate: d.date.toISOString(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          dataCom: d.date.toISOString(),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          amount: d.amount,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        })).sort((a: any, b: any) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      } catch (e) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        continue;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async searchTicker(query: string): Promise<any[]> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const genericQuery = query.toLowerCase().trim();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const genericMap: Record<string, string[]> = {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        'ações': ['PETR4.SA', 'VALE3.SA', 'ITUB4.SA', 'BBDC4.SA', 'BBAS3.SA', 'WEGE3.SA'],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        'fiis': ['MXRF11.SA', 'HGLG11.SA', 'BTLG11.SA', 'CPTS11.SA', 'KNRI11.SA', 'VISC11.SA'],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        'bdr': ['AAPL34.SA', 'MSFT34.SA', 'GOGL34.SA', 'AMZO34.SA', 'MELI34.SA', 'NVDC34.SA'],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        'bdrs': ['AAPL34.SA', 'MSFT34.SA', 'GOGL34.SA', 'AMZO34.SA', 'MELI34.SA', 'NVDC34.SA'],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        'stocks': ['AAPL', 'MSFT', 'GOOGL', 'AMZN', 'NVDA', 'TSLA'],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        'cripto': ['BTC-USD', 'ETH-USD', 'SOL-USD', 'BNB-USD', 'XRP-USD', 'ADA-USD']
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (genericMap[genericQuery]) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const topSymbols = genericMap[genericQuery];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const results = await Promise.all(topSymbols.map(async (symbol) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            const qResp = await yahooFinance.quote(symbol) as any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            return {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              symbol: qResp.symbol,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              shortname: qResp.shortName || qResp.longName || symbol,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              longname: qResp.longName || qResp.shortName || symbol,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              typeDisp: genericQuery === 'cripto' ? 'Cryptocurrency' : 'Equity',
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              regularMarketPrice: qResp.regularMarketPrice,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:              regularMarketChangePercent: qResp.regularMarketChangePercent
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          } catch (e) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            return null;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        return results.filter(Boolean);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const isBrazilian = query.length >= 4 && query.length <= 6 && !query.includes('.');
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const searchQuery = isBrazilian ? `${query}.SA` : query;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const result = await yahooFinance.search(searchQuery, {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        quotesCount: 6,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        newsCount: 0
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (result && (result as any).errors) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        console.warn(`[YAHOO] Search for ${searchQuery} returned errors:`, formatYahooError((result as any).errors));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      let quotes = (result as any)?.quotes ?? [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      // If no results and we tried with .SA, try without .SA
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (quotes.length === 0 && isBrazilian) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        const fallbackResult = await yahooFinance.search(query, {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          quotesCount: 6,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          newsCount: 0
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }) as any;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        if (fallbackResult && (fallbackResult as any).errors) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          console.warn(`[YAHOO] Fallback search for ${query} returned errors:`, formatYahooError((fallbackResult as any).errors));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        quotes = (fallbackResult as any)?.quotes ?? [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const enrichedQuotes = await Promise.all(quotes.map(async (q: any) => {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        try {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          const quoteData = await yahooQuote(q.symbol, 2000);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          return {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            ...q,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            ticker: q.symbol,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            name: q.shortname || q.longname || q.symbol,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            exchange: q.exchange,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            type: q.quoteType,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            price: quoteData?.regularMarketPrice?.toLocaleString('pt-BR', { minimumFractionDigits: 2 }),
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            change: quoteData?.regularMarketChangePercent ? `${quoteData.regularMarketChangePercent > 0 ? '+' : ''}${quoteData.regularMarketChangePercent.toFixed(2)}%` : undefined,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            positive: quoteData?.regularMarketChangePercent ? quoteData.regularMarketChangePercent >= 0 : undefined
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        } catch (e) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          return {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            ...q,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            ticker: q.symbol,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            name: q.shortname || q.longname || q.symbol,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            exchange: q.exchange,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:            type: q.quoteType
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:          };
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      }));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return enrichedQuotes;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    } catch (e) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      console.warn(`[YAHOO] Erro ao buscar ticker para ${query}:`, formatYahooError(e));
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      return [];
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }

src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  static async executeBatch<T>(
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    tasks: (() => Promise<T>)[],
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    concurrency = this._options.concurrencyLimit,
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  ): Promise<(T | Error)[]> {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const results: (T | Error)[] = new Array(tasks.length);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    const executing = new Set<Promise<void>>();
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < tasks.length; i++) {
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const idx = i;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      const p   = tasks[idx]()
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        .then(res  => { results[idx] = res; })
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        .catch(err => { results[idx] = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error(String(err)); }) 
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:        .finally(() => { executing.delete(p); });
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      executing.add(p);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:      if (executing.size >= concurrency) await Promise.race(executing);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    }
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    await Promise.all(executing);
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:    return results;
src/lib/nexus/engine.ts:  }

src/lib/utils.ts:export function parseFinanceValue(v: any): number {
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (v === undefined || v === null) return 0;
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (typeof v === 'number') return v;
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (typeof v === 'string') {
src/lib/utils.ts:    const cleaned = v.trim().replace('R$', '').replace('%', '').replace(/\s/g, '');
src/lib/utils.ts:    if (cleaned === '---' || cleaned === 'N/A' || cleaned === '') return 0;
src/lib/utils.ts:    
src/lib/utils.ts:    // Check if it's Brazilian format (1.234,56) or US format (1,234.56)
src/lib/utils.ts:    // If it has a comma and a dot, we need to be careful.
src/lib/utils.ts:    // In BR format, the comma is the last separator.
src/lib/utils.ts:    const lastComma = cleaned.lastIndexOf(',');
src/lib/utils.ts:    const lastDot = cleaned.lastIndexOf('.');
src/lib/utils.ts:    
src/lib/utils.ts:    if (lastComma > lastDot) {
src/lib/utils.ts:      // BR Format: 1.234,56
src/lib/utils.ts:      return parseFloat(cleaned.replace(/\./g, '').replace(',', '.')) || 0;
src/lib/utils.ts:    } else if (lastDot > lastComma) {
src/lib/utils.ts:      // US Format: 1,234.56
src/lib/utils.ts:      return parseFloat(cleaned.replace(/,/g, '')) || 0;
src/lib/utils.ts:    } else if (lastComma !== -1) {
src/lib/utils.ts:      // Only comma: 12,34
src/lib/utils.ts:      return parseFloat(cleaned.replace(',', '.')) || 0;
src/lib/utils.ts:    }
src/lib/utils.ts:    
src/lib/utils.ts:    return parseFloat(cleaned) || 0;
src/lib/utils.ts:  }
src/lib/utils.ts:  return 0;
src/lib/utils.ts:}
src/lib/utils.ts:
src/lib/utils.ts:export function formatCurrency(v: number): string {
src/lib/utils.ts:  return v.toLocaleString('pt-BR', {
src/lib/utils.ts:    style: 'currency',
src/lib/utils.ts:    currency: 'BRL',
src/lib/utils.ts:    minimumFractionDigits: 2,
src/lib/utils.ts:    maximumFractionDigits: 2,
src/lib/utils.ts:  });
src/lib/utils.ts:}
src/lib/utils.ts:
src/lib/utils.ts:export function formatPercentage(v: number): string {
src/lib/utils.ts:  return v.toLocaleString('pt-BR', {
src/lib/utils.ts:    style: 'percent',
src/lib/utils.ts:    minimumFractionDigits: 2,
src/lib/utils.ts:    maximumFractionDigits: 2,
src/lib/utils.ts:  });
src/lib/utils.ts:}
src/lib/utils.ts:
src/lib/utils.ts:export function formatCompactNumber(v: number | string): string {
src/lib/utils.ts:  const num = typeof v === 'string' ? parseFinanceValue(v) : v;
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (!num || isNaN(num)) return 'N/A';
src/lib/utils.ts:  
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (num >= 1_000_000_000_000) {
src/lib/utils.ts:    return (num / 1_000_000_000_000).toLocaleString('pt-BR', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' T';
src/lib/utils.ts:  }
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (num >= 1_000_000_000) {
src/lib/utils.ts:    return (num / 1_000_000_000).toLocaleString('pt-BR', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' Bi';
src/lib/utils.ts:  }
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (num >= 1_000_000) {
src/lib/utils.ts:    return (num / 1_000_000).toLocaleString('pt-BR', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' Mi';
src/lib/utils.ts:  }
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (num >= 1_000) {
src/lib/utils.ts:    return (num / 1_000).toLocaleString('pt-BR', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) + ' K';
src/lib/utils.ts:  }
src/lib/utils.ts:  return num.toLocaleString('pt-BR', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
src/lib/utils.ts:}

src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:export function PortfolioProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {

src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const [quotaHistory, setQuotaHistory] = useState<any[]>([]);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const [syncingDividends, setSyncingDividends] = useState(false);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const lastSyncRef = React.useRef<number>(0);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    return nexusAgentService.subscribe((status) => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      setSyncingDividends(status.state === 'syncing' || status.state === 'analyzing');
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      if (status.state === 'complete') {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        loadDividendsFromCloud();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    });
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  }, [loadDividendsFromCloud]);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const loadDividendsFromCloud = useCallback(async () => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    try {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      const isConfigured = import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL && import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      if (isConfigured) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        if (user) {

src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:            .from('dividends')

src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:            .eq('user_id', user.id);

src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const syncAllDividends = useCallback(async () => {
