src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  }, [loading, portfolio.length, syncAllDividends]);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const fetchCurrentPrices = useCallback(async (items: PortfolioItem[]) => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    if (items.length === 0) return;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    try {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      const tickers = items.map(i => i.ticker);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      const batchResults = await financeService.getQuotesBatch(tickers);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      const updated = items.map(item => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const batchData = batchResults.find(b => b.ticker === item.ticker);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        let currentPrice = 0;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        if (batchData && batchData.price !== undefined) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          currentPrice = typeof batchData.price === 'number' ? batchData.price : parseFinanceValue(batchData.price);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        if (!currentPrice || isNaN(currentPrice)) currentPrice = item.averagePrice;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const currentValue = currentPrice * item.totalQuantity;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const profit = currentValue - item.totalInvested;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const profitPercentage = item.totalInvested > 0 ? (profit / item.totalInvested) * 100 : 0;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        return { 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          ...item, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          currentPrice, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          currentValue, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          profit, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          profitPercentage
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        };
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      });
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      setPortfolio(updated);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      // Update the final data point in quotaHistory to reflect current true prices
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      setQuotaHistory(prev => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        if (!prev || prev.length === 0) return prev;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const newHistory = [...prev];
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const lastIdx = newHistory.length - 1;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        let newTotalPatrimony = 0;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        updated.forEach(item => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          newTotalPatrimony += (item.currentValue || item.totalInvested);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        });
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        // Calculate new quota value based on the total patrimony change
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        // We assume we know the amount of quotas from the provider's logic
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        // The lastIdx point should have the same totalQuotas count as it's the most recent state
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        // To do this right, we'd need to track quotas. 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        // For simplicity and correctness in a P/L vs TWR context, let's just update the patrimony.
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        // If we want a perfect TWR, we need to pass the quota count out of calculateAdvancedPortfolio.
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        newHistory[lastIdx] = {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          ...newHistory[lastIdx],
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          totalPatrimony: newTotalPatrimony
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        };
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        return newHistory;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      });
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      console.error('Failed to fetch current prices via batch', err);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  }, []);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const processTransactions = useCallback((txs: Transaction[], events: any[] = []) => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    setTransactions(txs);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    const { currentPositions, taxLedger, quotaHistory } = calculateAdvancedPortfolio(txs, events);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    setTaxLedger(taxLedger);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    setQuotaHistory(quotaHistory);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    setPortfolio(currentPositions);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    setLoading(false);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    // Only fetch prices if there are positions
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    if (currentPositions.length > 0) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      fetchCurrentPrices(currentPositions);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  }, [fetchCurrentPrices]);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const fetchTransactions = useCallback(async () => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    const isConfigured = import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL && import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    if (!isConfigured) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      let localTxs = [];
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      try {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const stored = localStorage.getItem('invest_transactions');
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        localTxs = stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        if (!Array.isArray(localTxs)) localTxs = [];
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      } catch (e) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        console.error('Failed to parse localStorage in PortfolioProvider, resetting:', e);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        localTxs = [];
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        localStorage.setItem('invest_transactions', '[]');
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      processTransactions(localTxs, []);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      return;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    try {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      if (!user) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        setLoading(false);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        return;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      // Parallelize Supabase calls
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      const [txResult, eventResult] = await Promise.all([
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        supabase
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          .from('transactions')
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          .select('*')
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          .eq('user_id', user.id)
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          .order('date', { ascending: true }),
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        supabase
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          .from('corporate_events')
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:          .select('*')
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      ]);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      if (txResult.error) throw txResult.error;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      const mappedTxs: Transaction[] = (txResult.data || []).map(tx => ({
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        id: tx.id,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        ticker: tx.ticker,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        type: tx.type as 'BUY' | 'SELL',
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        assetType: tx.asset_type,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        quantity: Number(tx.quantity),
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        price: Number(tx.price),
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        date: tx.date,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        broker: tx.broker,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        user_id: tx.user_id
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      }));
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      processTransactions(mappedTxs, eventResult.data || []);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      loadDividendsFromCloud();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      console.error('Error in fetchTransactions:', error);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  }, [processTransactions, loadDividendsFromCloud]);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    fetchTransactions();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    loadDividendsFromCloud();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    const isConfigured = import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL && import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY;
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    const handleStorageChange = () => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      if (!isConfigured) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        const updatedTxs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('invest_transactions') || '[]');
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        processTransactions(updatedTxs);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        loadDividendsFromCloud();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      } else {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        fetchTransactions();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        loadDividendsFromCloud();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    };
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    window.addEventListener('invest_transactions_updated', handleStorageChange);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    window.addEventListener('invest_dividends_updated', handleStorageChange);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    if (!isConfigured) {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      return () => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        window.removeEventListener('invest_transactions_updated', handleStorageChange);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        window.removeEventListener('invest_dividends_updated', handleStorageChange);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    }
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    // Real-time subscription with unique channel name to avoid conflicts
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    const channel = supabase
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      .channel(`portfolio-updates-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(7)}`)
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      .on('postgres_changes', { 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        event: '*', 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        schema: 'public', 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        table: 'transactions' 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      }, () => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        fetchTransactions();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      })
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      .on('postgres_changes', { 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        event: '*', 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        schema: 'public', 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        table: 'dividends' 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      }, () => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:        loadDividendsFromCloud();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      })
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      .subscribe();
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    return () => {
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('invest_transactions_updated', handleStorageChange);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      window.removeEventListener('invest_dividends_updated', handleStorageChange);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      supabase.removeChannel(channel);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    };
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  }, [fetchTransactions, processTransactions, loadDividendsFromCloud]);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  const contextValue = React.useMemo(() => ({ 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    transactions, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    portfolio, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    dividends,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    taxLedger, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    quotaHistory, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    loading,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    syncingDividends,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    refresh: fetchTransactions,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    fetchDividends: loadDividendsFromCloud,
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    syncAllDividends
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  }), [
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    transactions, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    portfolio, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    dividends, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    taxLedger, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    quotaHistory,

src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    fetchTransactions, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    loadDividendsFromCloud, 
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    syncAllDividends
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  ]);
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  return (
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    <PortfolioContext.Provider value={contextValue}>
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:      {children}
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:    </PortfolioContext.Provider>
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:  );
src/contexts/PortfolioProvider.tsx:}

src/services/financeService.ts:async function fetchWithRetry(url: string, options: RequestInit = {}, retries = 2): Promise<Response> {
src/services/financeService.ts:  try {
src/services/financeService.ts:    const response = await fetch(url, options);
src/services/financeService.ts:    if (!response.ok) {
src/services/financeService.ts:      if (retries > 0 && response.status >= 500) {
src/services/financeService.ts:        console.warn(`[FINANCE] Retrying ${url} due to status ${response.status}. Retries left: ${retries - 1}`);
src/services/financeService.ts:        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
src/services/financeService.ts:        return fetchWithRetry(url, options, retries - 1);
src/services/financeService.ts:      }
src/services/financeService.ts:      
src/services/financeService.ts:      let message = `HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`;
src/services/financeService.ts:      try {
src/services/financeService.ts:        const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type');
src/services/financeService.ts:        const text = await response.text();
src/services/financeService.ts:        if (contentType && contentType.includes('application/json')) {
src/services/financeService.ts:          try {
src/services/financeService.ts:            if (text && text.trim()) {
src/services/financeService.ts:              const errorData = JSON.parse(text);
src/services/financeService.ts:              message = errorData.message || errorData.error || message;
src/services/financeService.ts:            }
src/services/financeService.ts:          } catch (e) {
src/services/financeService.ts:            message = `Malformed JSON error response: ${text?.slice(0, 100)}`;
src/services/financeService.ts:          }
src/services/financeService.ts:        } else {
src/services/financeService.ts:          if (text.includes('<!doctype') || text.includes('<html')) {
src/services/financeService.ts:            message = `Nexus Engine is warming up or routing error (Status ${response.status}). Please try again in a few seconds.`;
src/services/financeService.ts:          } else if (text) {
src/services/financeService.ts:            message = `Server error: ${text.slice(0, 100)}`;
src/services/financeService.ts:          }
src/services/financeService.ts:        }
src/services/financeService.ts:      } catch (e) {
src/services/financeService.ts:        // Fallback message already set
src/services/financeService.ts:      }
src/services/financeService.ts:      throw new Error(message);
src/services/financeService.ts:    }
src/services/financeService.ts:
src/services/financeService.ts:    // Check if we got JSON even if status is OK
src/services/financeService.ts:    const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type');
src/services/financeService.ts:    const method = options.method || 'GET';
src/services/financeService.ts:    if (method === 'GET' && contentType && !contentType.includes('application/json')) {
src/services/financeService.ts:      const text = await response.clone().text();
src/services/financeService.ts:      if (text.includes('<!doctype') || text.includes('<html')) {
src/services/financeService.ts:        throw new Error(`Unexpected HTML response for ${url}. This might be a session timeout or internal routing issue.`);
src/services/financeService.ts:      }
src/services/financeService.ts:    }
src/services/financeService.ts:
src/services/financeService.ts:    return response;
src/services/financeService.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/services/financeService.ts:    if (retries > 0 && (error instanceof TypeError || (error as any).name === 'AbortError')) {
src/services/financeService.ts:      console.warn(`[FINANCE] Retrying ${url} due to network error: ${error.message}. Retries left: ${retries - 1}`);
src/services/financeService.ts:      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
src/services/financeService.ts:      return fetchWithRetry(url, options, retries - 1);
src/services/financeService.ts:    }
src/services/financeService.ts:    throw error;
src/services/financeService.ts:  }

src/services/financeService.ts:const CACHE_TTL = 5 * 60 * 1000; // 5 minutes

src/services/financeService.ts:async function fetchWithCache(key: string, fetcher: () => Promise<any>): Promise<any> {

supabase/schema.sql:-- ====================================================================================
supabase/schema.sql:-- ESPECIFICAÇÃO TÉCNICA AVANÇADA - SCHEMA DO BANCO DE DADOS (POSTGRESQL / SUPABASE)
supabase/schema.sql:-- ====================================================================================
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- 1. Tabela de Usuários (Extensão da auth.users do Supabase)
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users (
supabase/schema.sql:    id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) PRIMARY KEY,
supabase/schema.sql:    full_name TEXT,
supabase/schema.sql:    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
supabase/schema.sql:    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- 2. Dicionário Mestre de Ativos (Atualizado via Motor de Ingestão)
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.assets (
supabase/schema.sql:    ticker VARCHAR(10) PRIMARY KEY,
supabase/schema.sql:    name TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    asset_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, -- 'ACAO', 'FII', 'BDR', 'ETF'
supabase/schema.sql:    sector TEXT,
supabase/schema.sql:    current_price DECIMAL(15, 4),
supabase/schema.sql:    last_updated TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- 3. Histórico Imutável de Transações (Ledger)
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.transactions (
supabase/schema.sql:    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
supabase/schema.sql:    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
supabase/schema.sql:    ticker VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, -- 'BUY', 'SELL'
supabase/schema.sql:    asset_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    quantity DECIMAL(15, 4) NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    price DECIMAL(15, 4) NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    broker TEXT,
supabase/schema.sql:    date TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- 4. Tabela Materializada de Posições (Consolidado Atual)
supabase/schema.sql:-- Atualizada via Triggers/Hooks sempre que há uma transação ou evento corporativo
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_positions (
supabase/schema.sql:    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
supabase/schema.sql:    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

supabase/schema.sql:    asset_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,

supabase/schema.sql:    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),

supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- 5. Eventos Corporativos (Desdobramentos, Grupamentos, Dividendos)
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.corporate_events (
supabase/schema.sql:    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
supabase/schema.sql:    ticker VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
supabase/schema.sql:    event_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- 'SPLIT', 'INPLIT', 'DIVIDEND'
supabase/schema.sql:    factor DECIMAL(15, 6), -- Ex: 4.0 para split 1:4, 0.1 para inplit 10:1
supabase/schema.sql:    value_per_share DECIMAL(15, 6), -- Para dividendos

supabase/schema.sql:    payment_date DATE,
supabase/schema.sql:    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
supabase/schema.sql:);
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:-- 6. Ledger Fiscal e Compensação de Prejuízos (Loss Carryforward)
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tax_ledger (
supabase/schema.sql:    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
supabase/schema.sql:    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

supabase/schema.sql:-- 7. Saldo de Prejuízos Acumulados (Atualizado mensalmente)
supabase/schema.sql:CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.user_tax_credits (
supabase/schema.sql:    user_id UUID REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

supabase/schema.sql:-- ====================================================================================
supabase/schema.sql:-- RLS (Row Level Security) Policies
supabase/schema.sql:-- ====================================================================================
supabase/schema.sql:ALTER TABLE public.users ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
supabase/schema.sql:ALTER TABLE public.transactions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
supabase/schema.sql:ALTER TABLE public.user_positions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
supabase/schema.sql:ALTER TABLE public.tax_ledger ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
supabase/schema.sql:ALTER TABLE public.user_tax_credits ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:DO $$ 
supabase/schema.sql:BEGIN
supabase/schema.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE policyname = 'Users can view their own profile') THEN
supabase/schema.sql:        CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own profile" ON public.users FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = id);
supabase/schema.sql:    END IF;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE policyname = 'Users can insert their own profile') THEN
supabase/schema.sql:        CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own profile" ON public.users FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = id);
supabase/schema.sql:    END IF;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE policyname = 'Users can update their own profile') THEN
supabase/schema.sql:        CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own profile" ON public.users FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = id);
supabase/schema.sql:    END IF;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE policyname = 'Users can view their own transactions') THEN
supabase/schema.sql:        CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own transactions" ON public.transactions FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
supabase/schema.sql:    END IF;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE policyname = 'Users can insert their own transactions') THEN
supabase/schema.sql:        CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own transactions" ON public.transactions FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);
supabase/schema.sql:    END IF;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE policyname = 'Users can view their own positions') THEN
supabase/schema.sql:        CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own positions" ON public.user_positions FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
supabase/schema.sql:    END IF;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE policyname = 'Users can view their own tax ledger') THEN
supabase/schema.sql:        CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own tax ledger" ON public.tax_ledger FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
supabase/schema.sql:    END IF;
supabase/schema.sql:
supabase/schema.sql:    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE policyname = 'Users can view their own tax credits') THEN
supabase/schema.sql:        CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own tax credits" ON public.user_tax_credits FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
supabase/schema.sql:    END IF;
supabase/schema.sql:END $$;

public/sw.js:const CACHE_NAME = 'nexus-invest-v2';
public/sw.js:const ASSETS_TO_CACHE = [
public/sw.js:  '/',
public/sw.js:  '/index.html',
public/sw.js:  '/manifest.json',
public/sw.js:  '/favicon.svg',
public/sw.js:  '/logo.svg'
public/sw.js:];
public/sw.js:
public/sw.js:self.addEventListener('install', (event) => {
public/sw.js:  self.skipWaiting();
public/sw.js:  event.waitUntil(
public/sw.js:    caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => {
public/sw.js:      return cache.addAll(ASSETS_TO_CACHE);
public/sw.js:    })
public/sw.js:  );
public/sw.js:});
public/sw.js:
public/sw.js:self.addEventListener('activate', (event) => {
public/sw.js:  event.waitUntil(
public/sw.js:    Promise.all([
public/sw.js:      self.clients.claim(),
public/sw.js:      caches.keys().then((cacheNames) => {
public/sw.js:        return Promise.all(
public/sw.js:          cacheNames.map((cacheName) => {
public/sw.js:            if (cacheName !== CACHE_NAME) {
public/sw.js:              return caches.delete(cacheName);
public/sw.js:            }
public/sw.js:          })
public/sw.js:        );
public/sw.js:      })
public/sw.js:    ])
public/sw.js:  );
public/sw.js:});
public/sw.js:
public/sw.js:self.addEventListener('fetch', (event) => {
public/sw.js:  // Network First strategy for HTML and API calls
public/sw.js:  if (event.request.mode === 'navigate' || event.request.url.includes('/api/')) {
public/sw.js:    event.respondWith(
public/sw.js:      fetch(event.request).catch(() => {
public/sw.js:        return caches.match(event.request);
public/sw.js:      })
public/sw.js:    );
public/sw.js:    return;
public/sw.js:  }
public/sw.js:
public/sw.js:  // Stale-while-revalidate for other assets
public/sw.js:  event.respondWith(
public/sw.js:    caches.match(event.request).then((response) => {
public/sw.js:      const fetchPromise = fetch(event.request).then((networkResponse) => {
public/sw.js:        if (networkResponse && networkResponse.status === 200) {
public/sw.js:          const responseToCache = networkResponse.clone();
public/sw.js:          caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then((cache) => {
public/sw.js:            cache.put(event.request, responseToCache);
public/sw.js:          });
public/sw.js:        }
public/sw.js:        return networkResponse;
public/sw.js:      });
public/sw.js:      return response || fetchPromise;
public/sw.js:    })
public/sw.js:  );
public/sw.js:});

README.md:# 🚀 Nexus Invest
README.md:
README.md:> A evolução da sua plataforma de análise e gestão de investimentos.
README.md:
README.md:O **Nexus Invest** é uma plataforma completa e moderna para investidores que buscam controle total sobre sua carteira, análises fundamentalistas profundas e inteligência de mercado em tempo real. Desenvolvido para superar as limitações de plataformas tradicionais, o Nexus combina uma interface premium (Dark Mode nativo) com Inteligência Artificial para entregar insights acionáveis.
README.md:
README.md:---
README.md:
README.md:## 🌟 Por que o Nexus Invest supera o Investidor10?
README.md:
README.md:Enquanto plataformas como o Investidor10 oferecem bons dados fundamentalistas, o Nexus Invest foi desenhado para ser **mais rápido, mais inteligente e focado na experiência do usuário (UX)**. 
README.md:
README.md:Aqui estão os nossos principais diferenciais:
README.md:
README.md:1. **Inteligência Artificial Integrada (Gemini):** O Nexus não apenas lista notícias, ele lê, interpreta e gera uma **análise de sentimento (Bullish, Bearish, Neutral)** em tempo real usando a API do Google Gemini, poupando o tempo do investidor.
README.md:2. **Importação Nativa da B3:** Esqueça o lançamento manual. O Nexus permite importar planilhas diretamente da área logada da B3 (Excel/CSV), mapeando automaticamente códigos, quantidades e preços.
README.md:3. **Privacidade e Controle (Local-First + Cloud):** Seus dados de transação podem ser salvos localmente no seu navegador (`localStorage`) para máxima privacidade, ou sincronizados na nuvem via Supabase.
README.md:4. **Ecossistema All-in-One:** Em vez de usar um site para ver fundamentos, uma planilha para rebalanceamento e outro app para IR, o Nexus unifica tudo:
README.md:   - **Isentômetro (IR):** Controle automático do limite de R$ 20.000 para isenção de imposto em ações.
README.md:   - **Rebalanceamento Inteligente:** Defina o percentual ideal da sua carteira e o Nexus calcula exatamente o que você precisa comprar ou vender.
README.md:   - **Calculadoras Avançadas:** Juros Compostos, Preço Teto (Bazin), Preço Justo (Graham) e Independência Financeira (FIRE) integradas.
README.md:5. **Design Premium e Fluido:** Construído com `motion/react` e Tailwind CSS, oferecendo transições suaves, ausência de poluição visual (sem anúncios intrusivos) e foco total nos dados que importam.
README.md:
README.md:---
README.md:
README.md:## 🛠️ Funcionalidades Principais
README.md:
README.md:### 📊 Gestão de Carteira
README.md:* **Dashboard Interativo:** Visão geral do patrimônio, rentabilidade e alocação por classe de ativo.
README.md:* **Rentabilidade Real:** Cálculo de rentabilidade utilizando o sistema de cotas (Time-Weighted Return - TWR), comparando diretamente com o IBOVESPA.
README.md:* **Transações:** Registro de compras e vendas com cálculo automático de preço médio.
README.md:* **Proventos (Dividendos):** Agenda de pagamentos futuros, histórico de recebimentos e cálculo de *Yield on Cost* (YOC).
README.md:
README.md:### 🔍 Análise de Mercado
README.md:* **Screener Avançado:** Filtre ações e FIIs por P/L, P/VP, Dividend Yield, ROE, Margem Líquida, entre outros.
README.md:* **Rankings Nexus:** Descubra as melhores oportunidades baseadas em metodologias consagradas (Graham, Décio Bazin, Maiores Pagadoras de Dividendos).
README.md:* **Comparador de Ativos:** Coloque duas ações lado a lado e compare seus múltiplos fundamentalistas.
README.md:* **Página de Ativo Detalhada:** Cotação em tempo real, gráficos interativos, indicadores fundamentalistas e empresas pares.
README.md:
README.md:### 🧠 Inteligência e Ferramentas
README.md:* **Market Intelligence (Notícias):** Feed de notícias filtrável com análise de sentimento gerada por IA.
README.md:* **Renda Fixa:** Simulador de investimentos comparando Tesouro Direto, CDBs, LCIs/LCAs com a Poupança.
README.md:* **Tributação:** Resumo fiscal e controle de isenção de vendas.
README.md:* **Carteiras Recomendadas:** Modelos de portfólio para diferentes perfis (Conservador, Arrojado, Focados em Dividendos).
README.md:
README.md:---
README.md:
README.md:## 💻 Stack Tecnológico
README.md:
README.md:O Nexus Invest foi construído com tecnologias de ponta para garantir performance e escalabilidade:
README.md:
README.md:* **Frontend:** React 18, TypeScript, Vite
README.md:* **Estilização:** Tailwind CSS, `lucide-react` (Ícones)
README.md:* **Animações:** `motion/react`
README.md:* **Gráficos:** `recharts`
README.md:* **Backend/API:** Express.js (Node.js) para proxy de dados financeiros
README.md:* **Inteligência Artificial:** `@google/genai` (Gemini 1.5 Flash)
README.md:* **Banco de Dados / Auth:** Supabase
README.md:* **Processamento de Dados:** `xlsx` (para leitura de planilhas da B3), `date-fns`
README.md:
README.md:---
README.md:
README.md:## 🚀 Como Executar o Projeto Localmente
README.md:
README.md:### Pré-requisitos
README.md:* Node.js (v18 ou superior)
README.md:* NPM ou Yarn
README.md:* Chave de API do Supabase (opcional para persistência em nuvem)
README.md:* Chave de API do Google Gemini (para análise de notícias)
README.md:
README.md:### Passo a Passo
README.md:
README.md:1. **Clone o repositório:**
README.md:   \`\`\`bash
README.md:   git clone https://github.com/seu-usuario/nexus-invest.git
README.md:   cd nexus-invest
README.md:   \`\`\`
README.md:
README.md:2. **Instale as dependências:**
README.md:   \`\`\`bash
README.md:   npm install
README.md:   \`\`\`
README.md:
README.md:3. **Configure as Variáveis de Ambiente:**
README.md:   Crie um arquivo `.env` na raiz do projeto e adicione:
README.md:   \`\`\`env
README.md:   VITE_SUPABASE_URL=sua_url_do_supabase
README.md:   VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=sua_chave_anon_do_supabase
README.md:   GEMINI_API_KEY=sua_chave_do_google_gemini
README.md:   \`\`\`
README.md:
README.md:4. **Inicie o servidor de desenvolvimento:**
README.md:   \`\`\`bash
README.md:   npm run dev
README.md:   \`\`\`
README.md:   *O aplicativo estará disponível em `http://localhost:3000`.*
README.md:
README.md:---
README.md:
README.md:## 📂 Estrutura do Projeto
README.md:
README.md:* `/src/pages/`: Contém todas as telas da aplicação (Dashboard, Portfolio, Screener, etc.).
README.md:* `/src/components/`: Componentes de UI reutilizáveis (Botões, Cards, Gráficos, Layout).
README.md:* `/src/contexts/`: Gerenciamento de estado global (ex: `PortfolioProvider.tsx`).
README.md:* `/src/services/`: Integração com APIs externas e serviços de dados financeiros (`financeService.ts`).
README.md:* `/src/lib/`: Funções utilitárias, cálculos complexos de portfólio (`portfolioCalc.ts`) e configuração do Supabase.
README.md:* `/api/`: Backend Express para rotas de proxy e web scraping de dados financeiros.
README.md:
README.md:---
README.md:
README.md:## 📈 Roadmap (Próximos Passos)
README.md:
README.md:- [ ] Integração com Open Finance para importação automática de saldo de corretoras.
README.md:- [ ] Alertas de preço e notificações de pagamento de dividendos via e-mail/push.
README.md:- [ ] Suporte a múltiplos portfólios (ex: Carteira Aposentadoria, Carteira Arrojada).
README.md:- [ ] Exportação de relatórios em PDF para declaração anual do Imposto de Renda.
